language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Ping-pong is a party game, where the speakers of each team try their partners to guess the secret element. The speakers give alternately give a clue.

Each team thus uses these clues and answers to the opposing team.

It's a competitive game, with 2 teams of 2 players.

Each round

                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                    
                
            
        
    


The first player draws the first card and rolls the dice.
The current element (the solution) for this round is the element with the dice number.
He and his opponent (sitting next to him) read secretly the element. They are the clue givers.
Each of them will have to make their partner guess the element.
The clue givers say alternately a clue.
Afiter each clue, the partner of the clue givers Say what hé thinks is the solution.
Until a player finds the solution, the round proceeds so.
When a player finds the solution, his team scores 1 point.

Next round

                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                    
                
            
        
    


The player to the left of the first player becomes the first player.

End of the game

                                                            
                                                        
                                                    
                                                
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                    
                
            
        
    


When a team scores 7 points, this team wins.

-description from designer

An asymmetrical, standalone expansion for Hero: Tales of the Tomes. One player controls the powerful Onyx King and up to 3 players team up to try and to take them down.

Play it on its own, or combine it with the heroes and cards from the base game. Includes 4 new heroes, 200 new cards, new mechanics, and new ways to play.

Just like the base game, all of the players play off of one shared deck. Whether it’s a free-for-all battle, or taking on the Onyx King, no prior deck building or card collecting is required to play.

Two Crowns is a two (or more) player game, in the attack/defend, turn- and phase-based realm, that anyone can play with cards they likely already own. It employs mechanics that serve as a gateway to more complicated Trading Card Games like Magic: The Gathering and Pokemon, while striving to be easy to learn with hidden depths and strategies.

All that is required to play is a standard playing card deck with Jokers (4 regular six-sided dice are helpful to track damage, but not necessary as pen and paper work too). The goal of the game is to finish off your opponent's Kings by purchasing and playing Knight and Cavalry Cards, represented by Jacks and Aces. The attacking cards are procured using Coin Cards (5 through 10) from players' Banks, which are deposited into each turn. The other cards are various Effects and Instantaneous Use items that sway the game.

-description from designer

The Maple Valley Kickstarter edition comes with 2 mini-expansions packaged inside the box as well as many wooden resources and Game Trayz inserts.

Feathered Friends Mini-Expansion - gives you a whole new way to travel around the board and do actions in different ways. Mix into the Friends deck and make a pile of feathers. They don't use the trails to travel, each one describes how it moves. Each one also has a powerful ability that you activate in addition to activating the location you arrive at. Whenever you arrive at a location with any feathers, gather them for free. Feathers count as wild curiosities.
 Roaming Raven Mini-Expansion - The raven is an independent pawn that roams the valley. Whenever you travel to the Raven's location via a trail (never a zoom), you can make one free trade - any resource for any other! Then the raven exits the location along the trail you entered.

180 wooden resources 
1 wooden worm 
50 wooden player markers
Game Trayz custom game inserts

Rock Paper Swords is a strategy and push your luck card game designed for 2 players. Simple to learn and quick to play, with both luck and strategic decision making affecting victory. Can also be played without reading as a speed and dexterity game perfect for smaller children, inspired by card games such as condottiere and Gobbit.

RPS is played in rounds, with players simultaneously choosing an opening trio of cards hidden from view, followed by turns of ability activation, combat, and card movement. Simple rock paper scissors rules means turn order and elimination is lightning quick, but victory may just as quickly slip from your grasp.

3 wins in a row or accumulate 30 value in defeated cards to be declared victor.

Print and play PDF at https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pxggmCW4XjgmuTUvGFx3EnjV5RSQvYZ6/view?usp=sharing
Print on demand at https://www.thegamecrafter.com/games/rock-paper-swords

Rock crushes swords cuts paper burns rock…

-description from designer

The gallery is seeking new masterpieces! In Canvas: Finishing Touches, complete your works of art and show them off to the world with the new Frames! These Frames add a layer of interaction as players compete to have their work displayed on the gallery wall.

The Deluxe Edition includes:

+  10 more transparent art cards

+ 12 painter cards

+  15 holofoil wood platinum ribbons

+ 5 signature style cards

+  12 more sleeves
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
In the echoing sounds of camel bells along the Hexi Corridor, Silk Road invites players to relive the grandeur of the ancient Silk Road that extended from the prosperous Chang'an.

This game is a journey through history, allowing players to follow in the footsteps of ancient traders and experience the excitement and joy of traversing mountains and seas, guided by the roll of the dice.

Objective

Players aim to prosper by engaging in trade between various cities, accumulating precious silver along the way.

Gameplay

Starting with the youngest player and proceeding clockwise, each player takes turns performing four actions: rolling the dice, moving their game piece, establishing trade routes, and engaging in trade exchanges.

Game End

The game concludes when players deplete the silver supply pile. Gameplay continues, with any subsequent silver acquisition coming from the remaining silver in the box. The game ends when the player to the right of the starting player finishes their turn. The player with the highest silver total claims victory, and in the event of a tie, the player with the most remaining goods emerges as the winner.

A game of quick thinking and clever deduction presented by Will Shortz, NPR's puzzlemaster and crossword editor of the New York times. Take number/color tiles to make your hidden code. Force opponnts to give clues. Strengthen your code. Guess and reveal opponent tiles. Be the last code standing to win.

boardgame: Warhammer Age of Sigmar: Warcry – Questor Soulsworn
description:
The Questor Soulsworn exist outside the chamber structure of Sigmar's heavenly armies, wandering fellowships bound together by prophecies and omens from the God-King himself. Each of these elite Stormcast Eternals is a storied champion in their own right, expected to overcome impossible odds as they undertake quests of the grandest import.

This multipart plastic kit builds a full warband of Questor Soulsworn, for use in games of Warcry. First among equals, the Questor-Prime brings the light of Azyr to the darkest places in the Mortal Realms, advised by a Soulsworn Knight-Relictor.

This set contains six plastic miniatures:
- 2x Errant-Questors armed with a choice of grandaxes or grandspears, each of which can alternatively be built as a Questor-Prime
- 2x Errant-Questors armed with a choice of grandhammers or grandblades, each of which can alternatively be built as a Soulsworn Knight-Relictor
- 2x Errant-Questors armed with a choice of grandhammers or grandaxes, each of which can alternatively be built as an Errant-Questor Duellist with Twinblades

This set also includes:
- A Questor Soulsworn abilities card, to aid you in executing your noble quest in games of Warcry (in English, French, Italian, German, Spanish, Chinese, and Japanese)
- 7x Questor Soulsworn fighter cards, for referencing your rules and stats at a glance
- 2x wound divider cards, for tracking your fighters in battle

This kit comprises 130 plastic components, and comes with 6x Citadel 40mm Round Bases.

boardgame: Warhammer Age of Sigmar: Warcry – Kruleboyz Monsta-killaz
description:
Kruleboyz Monsta-killaz are sadistic, underhanded hunters from the Beast-breaka tribes. Masters of the sudden ambush and the devious ruse, these orruks eagerly employ every kunnin’ trick in the book to capture their quarry and defeat those who would stand in their way.

This multipart plastic kit builds a full Kruleboyz Monsta-killaz warband, for use in games of Warcry. These cunning fighters are led by a scarred Beastnob, while the Bawla Boy bashes out a threatening beat to terrify quarry and rivals. Cruel orruk Neckslicers are joined by Gnarlwood Howlaz – tamed simian creatures that.

This set contains 8 plastic miniatures:

- 1x Beastnob
- 1x Bawla Boy, who can be armed with a stabba or flogga
- 1x Klutcha-grot
- 2x Neckslicers, who can each be armed with a bonehakka or beaststikka harpoon
- 1x Neckslicer, who can be armed with a smasha or beaststikka harpoon
- 2x Gnarlwood Howlaz
This set also includes:

- A Kruleboyz Monsta-killaz abilities card, for quick referencing in games of Warcry (in English, French, Italian, German, Spanish, Chinese, and Japanese)
- 8x Kruleboyz Monsta-killaz fighter cards, for checking your rules and stats at a glance
- 2x Warcry wound divider cards, for tracking damage done to your fighters in battle

This kit comprises 54 plastic components, and comes with 1x Citadel 40mm Round Base, 1x Citadel 28.5mm Round Base, and 6x Citadel 32mm Round Bases

Škoda kouzla, které padne vedle is a deck-building card game for two players. In the game, you step into the battles of wizards, aiming to defeat your opponent through spells, creatures, and better strategy. You can choose the path of dark curses, destructive fire, binding frost, or forest wisdom. A portion of your cards must be used as a source of magic, and then you decide whether to attack, build defense, or purchase new cards that can eventually lead you to victory.

During the game, you will encounter three types of cards: Spells, Creatures, and Defense. Spells represent a one-time effect that is executed immediately, and the card itself then goes to the discard pile. Creatures and defense, on the other hand, remain in play in front of the wizard in a row until the opponent destroys them. The order of the cards placed in the row matters because the cards in the middle are protected by those on the edges.

The game features a large number of unique cards, each with non-repeating effects. Each match provides new possibilities and combinations of individual game effects. Therefore, you must adapt your gameplay strategy based on what is currently available in the wizard's store. In addition to cards, there are three types of tokens and crystals in the game, representing the freezing effect. This allows you to, for example, cast a curse on your opponent that gradually poisons them or freeze them to prevent them from casting further spells.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Škoda kouzla, které padne vedle je deckbuildingová karetní hra pro dva hráče. Ve hře vstupujete do souboje čarodějů a vaším cílem je prostřednictvím kouzel, bytostí a lepší strategie porazit svého soupeře. Nákupy v čarodějnickém obchodě postupně vylepšujete svůj balíček karet a připravujete se na to, stát se mistrem magie. Můžete si zvolit cestu temných kleteb, ničivého ohně, svazujícího mrazu nebo lesní moudrosti. Ke všemu ale potřebujete velké množství magické síly, kterou není snadné získat. Část svých karet proto musíte použít jako zdroj magie a poté se rozhodnout zda útočit, budovat obranu nebo nakupovat nové karty, které vám časem mohou pomoci k vítězství.
 Při hře narazíte na 3 typy karet. Kouzla, bytosti a obranu. Kouzla představují jednorázový efekt, který se realizuje ihned a samotná karta poté jde na odhazovací balíček. Bytosti a obrana oproti tomu zůstávají ve hře vyloženy před čarodějem v jedné řadě, dokud je soupeř nezničí. Záleží přitom na pořadí vyložených karet, protože karty uprostřed řady jsou chráněny těmi na kraji.

Ve hře je celkově velké množství unikátních karet, jejichž efekt se neopakuje. Každá partie proto poskytuje nové možnosti a kombinace jednotlivých herních efektů. Svojí herní strategii proto musíte přizpůsobit také tomu, co lze právě nakupovat v čarodějnickém obchodě. Kromě karet jsou ve hře také 3 druhy žetonů a krystaly, představující efekt zmrazení. Na soupeře můžete díky tomu např. uvrhnout kletbu, která ho postupně otráví nebo ho zmrazit a zabránit mu sesílat další kouzla.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable
family: Players: Games with expansions that add solo play
Players: Games with expansions that change player count

boardgame: Die Legenden von Andor: Die Ewige Kälte – Die Bruderfeuer
description:
Legends of Andor: The Brother Fires is a mini expansion for Legends of Andor: The Eternal Frost for legends 2-4 to aid the heroes.

At SPIEL in Essen 2023, Michael Menzel signed exclusive mini expansions! "The Brother Fires" was one of them.

The theme is coffea cultivation and harvesting.
     Polyomino placement puzzle roll & write game
     For 4 players only, play time 90 minutes
     Write the polyominoes made by others (and the polyominoes you made yourself) on your own sheet.
     However, polyominos gradually become larger.


Coffea — Expand & Write is a print-and-play game focused on tile placement puzzles. You are an owner of Coffea (coffee tree) plantations to plant, develop and harvest. Each round, you write several farms—figures within up to 5x5 squares—onto your plantation, expand your farms, and harvest coffee beans from the plantation.
Players have their own farms. Only the owner may expand their farm but it can be used by all players according to the die results. The bigger the farm becomes, the harder it is to write the farm. The key to win is how wisely you choose the farm each turn, and harvest as many coffee beans as possible!

—description from the designer

You've been summoned to Castle Slogar to celebrate Melissa's 9th birthday … again! But the party has gone awfully awry. Guests are scattered throughout the labyrinthine castle, and Lord Slogar is missing! It's up to you to lend a hand, or a foot, or whatever you can spare to save the party and rescue Lord Slogar.

Unhappy Birthday at Castle Slogar is a sorrowful solo gamebook filled with interactive puzzles. A full map of the castle shows which rooms you've explored. The book's sections describe each room, where you'll face a horrible hindrance or a character whose dismal dilemma you'll solve to access the next room. Having trouble? A special website provides hints and extra material. Unravel the riddles then use your answers to find the gloriously gloomy finale!

—description from the publisher

A mysterious journal falls into your hands. Its worn pages chronicle a cross-country search for elusive cryptid monsters. Solve the puzzles hidden in the journal’s passages to discover which one of the creatures is real, and the fate of the disappeared cryptid hunter!

Cryptid Hunt is a puzzling solo gamebook filled with interactive puzzles. The book's sections describe each cryptid, and hidden clues in each add pieces to the puzzle. Having trouble? A special website provides hints and extra material. Unravel the riddles then use your answers to solve the enigma of the cryptid hunter’s end!

—description from the publisher

Urbanizing the Card is a print-and-play game that aims to be a city-building game base. The game is meant to be part of a business card, an example of a minimalist serious game about urban planning.

General rules:

     Roll a D6 die (Start).
     Choose the building (B, the row (R), or the column (C). The die result must match one of these (B, R or C). 
     Fill the circle of the selected building and draw the number of respective icons in the map (same number of previously filled circles)
     Transport infrastructures have special rules (they must be adjacent and can overlay/erase other structures)
     If you can draw a new building, do it and then go to the Start; otherwise, do the scoring. 


There is a solo and a multiplayer version of the game.

—description from the designer

boardgame: War of the Ring: The Seeing Stones
description:
Promotional Mini-Expansion given out with pre-orders of Kings of Middle-earth.

Includes two Kings of Middle-earth Event cards for use with the War of the Ring boardgame.

Knowledge of the Seeing Stones: Choose one of the Shadow Event decks and draw the top three cards. Choose one to discard and one to reshuffle into the deck, then place the third one back on top. Then, draw one Event card from one your decks. 
The King's Banner: Play if Aragorn or an Awaken Sovereign is in the battle. Before rolling the dice for your Leader re-reroll, forfeit Aragorn's or the Sovereign's Leadership to cancel the Leader re-reroll of the Shadow player.

The Palantir of Minas Tirith: Play if you control Minas Tirith or Denethor, Corrupted Ruler, is in play. Look at the Event cards in the hand of one Free Peoples player and choose one of them. Place that card back into the matching deck and shuffle it, or discard that card if "The Palantir of Barad-dur" is in play. Then if "The Palantir of Orthanc" is in play, draw one Event card from one of your decks.
Battle is Vain: Play if the total Nazgul Leadership is 1 or more. Forfeit up to 5 points of Nazgul Leadership to reduce the Free Peoples Leadership by the same amount.
family: Series: War of the Ring (Nexus/Ares Games)

description:
All aboard the Oriental Express!

Test your powers of deduction in this classic whodunit mystery game!

A crime has been committed... and only you can solve it.
Play the role of a famous detective - from Sheerluck Homes and Missing Marbles to Hercules Parrot and Ivan Inkling - moving from carriage to carriage collecting clues and trying to fit the pieces of the puzzle together.

Classic family fun, it's a race to reveal who did the dastardly deed!

boardgame: Kabula: Chastity – The Battle Nun Expansion
description:
Chastity: The Battle Nun - additional playable hero:
5 cards + miniature.

Once she arrived on the Island, Chastity immediately realized she was sent to Hell with the goal of butchering demons. Equipped with a massive sword that gets more powerful the more it's used, Chastity offers a unique and engaging gameplay experience.

This is a set of items for KAPOW! Volume 1 and 2 that were only available during the Kickstarter campaign.

It contains 4 more character:

     Sawmill Jackson (2 vs 1 Character)
     Porcupine (2 vs 1 Character)
     Quintessa (Hero)
     Worm (Villain)


It also features some blank/gray dice faces which are needed for the powers of Quintessa and Worm.

boardgame: Patch: The Card Game – Volume Two
description:
Expansion set for Patch Vol 1 which adds 25 new cards, including a new card type! - Interactions

9x Abstraction cards
8x Interaction cards
4x Progression cards
4x Disruption cards

Plus instructions card and embossed tuck box.

A family game where players aim to navigate the pitfalls of social life as best as they can and complete tasks associated with understanding the rules of decent conduct in society. The objective for each player and the pinnacle of their social career is a visit to Buckingham Palace and an audience with the queen.

The essence of the game lies in acquiring social positions and solidifying them. It is up to the player whether they decide to have more socially weaker positions or a smaller number of stronger ones. If a player wants to be strong, they can achieve this either by enhancing their own social standing or by weakening the standing of others. However, this cannot be done without knowledge of etiquette rules, combined with proper strategic decision-making.

Your wedding night at the Honeymoon Hotel turns into a nightmare when your newlywed spouse suddenly reveals their true nature. The hotel becomes a trap filled with booby traps from which you must escape. Honeymoon Hotel is an adventurous card game full of strategy that you'll want to play over and over again. Which bride will manage to escape, and who will meet a certain death?

Honeymoon Hotel – The Card Game is the first game in the world based on an existing escape room! In this unique card game, playable with 2 to 6 players, you return to the mysterious Honeymoon Hotel, but this time you are one of the brides trying to escape from the murderous maniac you've unwittingly married.

Honeymoon Hotel – The Card Game is not an escape room game with puzzles. It's a strategic card game that you can play again and again! If you dare, that is…

—description from the designer

A little board game for 2.
Each player has 5 cards: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4.
5 rounds of play.

Round
The 2 players simultaneously place a card, face down, then reveal it.
If the sum is even, the larger one wins.
If the sum is odd, the smaller one wins.
If = nobody wins the cards.
So, each card wins and loses against 2 cards.

End of the game
Sum the numbers on the cards, the player with the highest score wins.

Enter the world of Remembrall, an exciting game that will put your visual memory to the test.

Carefully remember the contents of the 3 decks, each containing 30 unique cards with 2 levels of difficulty.

No need for a Pensieve: find the pairs yourself and prove your own skills!

Who will uncover the mysterious hidden pairs or triples first?

At the beginning of the game, players decide on the game mode. Place the cards for that game mode face down, then carry out the objectives on objective cards to earn as many points as possible. Be careful, you will need your memory and your audacity to find the pairs or triples.
When all the pairs or triples have been found, the player with the most wins the game!

—description from the publisher

Dive into the world of Harry Potter and challenge your loved ones with 500 questions about the saga.
The only rule is not to use the Memory Charm against other players like Gilderoy Lockhart: "Obliviate!"
Take turns to answer one of the 5 themed questions about one of the 8 films and be the fastest to get 7 correct answers to win.

You must get 7 points as quickly as possible by answering the questions correctly. Each correct answer earns you one point. Choose the question number and try to answer it correctly.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Blood Throne: The Tower of Sacrifice
description:
The  world of Cheol is riven by monsters thirsting for the blood and souls of the innocent. Belphegore, the Lord of Sacrifice is attempting to seize the Blood Throne and become a god in a world where the gods are dead. Your heroes come from every nation still standing to join the Last Accord in their desperate attempt to stop him.

Assemble Your Party

Manage a party of heroes with unique strengths in this cooperative fantasy board game for 1-7 players.

Battle Horrifying Monsters

Level up, gain new skills and loot while the persistent, narrative campaign unfolds with your choices.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Lost Caverns of Ixalan
description:
In this expansion for Magic: The Gathering, players will explore the subterranean depths of the world of Ixalan, where lost civilizations have sealed themselves off from the surface and ancient threats stir from centuries of slumber.

The set also includes a tie-in with the Jurassic Park franchise. Set boosters and collector boosters have a chance to include unique cards based on characters, locations, and events from Jurassic Park and its various sequels.

Demo version of OléMains! game.

Mini-game with the same mechanics as the basic version.

Hello bunnies!

Put a card on your forehead, and the members of your team make you guess the word written on it. As soon as the word is found you take another one. Quickly, you have 1 minute to find as many words as possible. Then next time, the other team plays on the same theme!

9 themes in total, on which each team will compete: celebrities, songs, brands, sport, there is something for everyone. You will have to mime, hum, describe... Each theme has its own rule!

So, which of your loved ones will reveal an incredible talent?

Not so fast! On each theme, each team draws a pledge card to spice up the event.

You are going to describe.. but by rapping!

Then mime... but keeping your elbows close to your body!

Ready ?

Let's go !

Demo version of the game Mes Amis Sont...

In Mes Amis Sont... a referee reads the beginning of an Internet search, for example "How to pretend to..." and off we go: 2 teams have 40 seconds to guess the different automatic suggestions seen on the search engines . Think like the Internet and you will be rewarded!

Mes Amis Sont... is inspired by the Internet, because on the web, when you enter the start of a search, you often receive surprising ending suggestions! It's up to you to guess as many suggestions as possible from our authors to help your team win!

In Mes Amis Sont... there is a referee and two teams: the reds and the blues. The referee takes the hourglass, the six tokens and draws a card. It starts the trick by reading the start of a search, e.g. : “How to pretend to…” and presto, he turns the hourglass over!

The players then have 40 seconds to give as many suggestions as possible for the end of a sentence orally, in no imposed order. As soon as the referee hears a valid proposition - close to a suggestion on the card - he places a token in front of the player concerned. Ex: if a player says "work", he can validate because this evokes the suggestion "work".

Each token won moves the team's pawn forward as many spaces on the edge of the box. Bonus: a token won thanks to a suggestion marked with a smiley by the authors of the game, double count! The first team to reach the Victory box wins the game!

boardgame: きくり・ざ・ろっく！(Kikuri the Rock!)
description:
This game, roughly translated as Kikuri the Rock!, is a trick-taking game featuring shared hands of cards. Most of the cards exist in two colors - black and pink.

Cards are not dealt to one specific player, but rather a player holds their cards between them and the player on their left. Players should also not sort the cards.

On your turn, you can play the card from either end of either hand - on your left or your right.

The highest card played to a trick takes the 2nd highest card; the 2nd highest card takes the 3rd highest card; and the 3rd highest card takes the 4th highest.  However, the lowest card takes the high card from the previous trick.

At the end of the game, black cards are worth negative face value, and pink cards are worth positive points.
designers: Ei Tanikawa (たにかわ えい)

description:
Poli Has Come! is a set collection game with a few special action cards. On their turn, players draw 2 cards from the deck and play sets of cards if they can. Out of turn, they can also swap cards from their hand with a public market.

There are also boss, police, and dog cards which can be played by the active player for certain effects.

The person with the most points when the deck runs out is the winner.
publishers: Studium Mundi (スタジオムンディ)

description:
A sophisticated tile placement game that uses a unique tile shape with 3 rounded sides.

Players attempt to build their asymmetrical stratgies while blocking other players attempts to work on their own. Place, stack and fidget these unique tiles to victory.

—description from the designer

Published by サザンクロス・マネジメント (Southern Cross Management) in 2006, alongside the release of the Fist of the North Star: The Legends of the True Savior series of movie, this collectible card game features two players representing the elders of enemy villages, recruiting characters from the series to defeat each other in a race to 5 Victory Points.
family: Characters: Fist of the North Star
publishers: サザンクロス・マネジメント (Southern Cross Management)

description:
Totally Not T9 is a set of two low-luck trick-taking games. Both games are nominally postal themed.

The first game, called Totally Not T9, is played over two rounds (or three rounds with the optional variant). Players draft their cards each round. As the trick play occurs, the deck will deplete, so there will be 11 tricks in the first round, but only 6 in the second round. Players gain cards into their score piles along the way, with the highest card taking the lowest card in the trick, and the lowest card taking the highest. At the end of the game, the player getting the closest to or reaching 40 points without going over 40 wins.

The second game, Stamp Out Bootleggers, is a one-hand trick taking game. The illegal speakeasies don’t want any particular letters (i.e. cards) traced back to them, so no player owns their hand of cards. On their turn, a player will play a card from any of the four hands of cards on the table. Each hand can only be played once into each trick. Players gain cards into their score piles for winning tricks, with each card being worth its face value in points. The player getting the closest to or reaching 40 points at the end of the game without going over 40 wins. But before final scoring, the postal inspectors (one suit) will make arrests of the bootleggers (the other three suits). For better or worse, this will keep those cards from counting towards a player’s score.

The name of the set is a joke. T9 was a 35 person trick-taking game played by mail; it was created for the T9 event. This was also created, in part, for the T9 event, but the name was already taken by the postal game, so this is called Totally Not T9.

—description from the designer

​A simple game for 2 to 6 players, that can be played in less than 30 minutes to play with the family on Christmas days.

Choose a die and place the corresponding ornament on your tree. Try to achieve the combination that gives you the most points.

Eat cookies to avoid bad luck with the dice, but not too many before you finish decorating your entire tree or you will lose possible points.

You will only need 2 dice in two colors. Each one represents a type of ornament, balls and figures. Balls can give you a lot of points by accumulating balls of the same type. The figures give more points initially and by placing your favorite or if you get all of them you will get a bonus.

The active player can choose which dice to choose, passive players will have to settle for what they are given, or eat a cookie to have more options.

—description from the designer

boardgame: 晴れた日はダムでキャンプしよ (Camp At The Dam On A Sunny Day)
description:
The dam is filled with abundant water and is perfect for camping. Let's camp at a beautiful dam on a sunny day!

晴れた日はダムでキャンプしよ is a must-follow trick-taking game with four types of dams with various storage rates: arch type, gravity concrete type, rock fill type, and earth type. The strength of your rank will change depending on the weather, so let's predict the weather.

During a typhoon, it is better to have less water to protect yourself from flooding, and during a drought, it is better to have a lot of water. If the weather is nice, camp at a dam with a moderate amount of water. However, dum curry is always delicious no matter what the occasion.

boardgame: ダムカードバトル FNAWIP
description: In the competitive trick-taking card game where you fight with dam cards, you can not only compete with the original dam cards from overseas that are included in the game, but you can also compete using dam cards distributed at over 1000 locations across Japan.

Tonight is night of the masquerade ball where the arrogant aristocrats and the commoners busy with their daily lives all wear masks to hide their identities. Some to fulfill their secret desires, some to fulfill their own mission... A dazzling night begins as various thoughts intertwine.

Masquerade Trick is a trick-taking game where you plays the roles of princesses, princes, assassins, and clowns, and perform trick-taking to accomplish the missions of their respective roles. Then, everyone points at the same time to the role card that they think is the person they are looking for.
user summary

Players play trick-taking as they complete missions for each character, such as princesses, princes, assassins, etc. After trick taking, players point to the character card designated for the mission. The player who completes two missions wins the game.
--description by publisher
publishers: Mysboard Games (ミスボドゲームズ)

description:
一人はスプーンで自分のメニューに合わせて材料を持ってきて、残りはサイコロを転がします。
サイコロからコーヒー豆の絵が出たら、「ロースティング！」と叫びます。
そしてスプーンを取って材料を持ってきます。いつまで？誰かが「ロースティング！」と叫ぶまで。

It's a game where you have to quickly complete the menu you ordered using the only coffee machine.
Anyone can easily enjoy it with a boisterous party game.

boardgame: Adventure Time Card Wars: Ultimate Collection
description: All 6 Adventure Time Card Wars Collector's Packs in one box! In this 1v1 trading card game, you play as your favorite Heroes, each with themed decks inspired by the TV show. Action takes place across four lanes with each player using Spells, Creatures, and Buildings to take down their opponents. Customize your decks for extra fun! And don't forget to Floop the Pig!
family: Versions & Editions: Big Box Versions of Individual Games

description:
Los huevos ("The eggs") is a fast-paced game where the objective is to pick eight egg cards and achieve the highest score possible. The game consists of only six turns, and each turn involves just one action: discarding a card and picking two new ones.

The cards are organized in sets of three eggs. Each card displays one egg, and the three cards in a set have the same back design, so when they are face down, it's not known which of the three values they represent.

Although the action is the same each turn, there are several details to consider. We can potentially deduce which egg we are picking, remember what we had discarded previously, calculate probabilities, and most importantly, take into account the values we possess because the score varies based on whether we have repeated or unique numbers.

It's a simple and fast game that involves deduction and memory skills.

—description from the designer

I went on a trip that day in search of ancient giants.
A sudden outbreak of the Black Death robs 15-year-old Theo of his quiet daily life. In order to save his mother life, the boy decides to enter the forbidden "dark forest".

The Giant and the Boy is his card game using 80 cards in two colors. Only players who overcome hardships by using their cards carefully and sometimes boldly will be able to survive. May the giant tree Muurometsu bless you!

Quick hands are required in the card game JEZZ. Save the future from disaster and collect points to win. A fast-paced game that requires good eyesight and reaction.

Beim Kartenspiel JEZZ sind schnelle Hände gefragt. Bewahre die Zukunft vor Katastrophen und sammle Punkte für den Sieg. Ein schnelles Spiel, bei dem es auf gute Augen und Reaktion ankommt.

boardgame: Chroniken von Drunagor: Zeitalter der Dunkelheit – Neue Helden & Neue Monster
description:
The armies of darkness are becoming stronger and a new threat is taking part in the struggle for Drunagor: the Demon Prince. You can face this lieutenant and his new attack cards and the two new monsters can make all your adventures even more varied.

But not only the army of darkness receives support. Two new heroes: have found their way to you and are ready to intervene in the struggle for the world of Drunagor:

The experienced hunter offers you his ranged lifestyles. The second new hero even belongs to a new hero class: as a shadow knight, Lordwrath brings with it a whole arsenal of new techniques and abilities that allow you new strategies.

Next to these two heroes: this extension includes all monsters from the Monster Pack 1 of the Gamefound Campaign. Look forward to Death, Dark Scout and, of course, on the Demon Prince.

Contents:
    2 Heroes miniatures: Handuring and Lordwrath
    9 monster miniatures
    2 hero table
    33 cards

Two microgames set in the near-future of a collapsed North Korea. Loose Nukes is a two player game that pits S. Korea and the US against China as both sides race to gain control of as many N. Korean nuclear sites as they can. KTO Crisis has both sides pushing to gain as much N. Korean territory as possible without triggering nuclear armageddon. Both games play in about 30 minutes with short rulesets and small counter counts.

—description from the publisher
family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

description:
Down at the shipyard, goods are unloaded off the boats and auctioned off to the highest bidder. Companies vie for the most amount of goods for the least amount of money. Timing is essential. Should you wait till the value goes down or buy the goods before your competitor does. It’s a cutthroat business and whoever has the most amount of goods wins the game.[/b]

Shipyard Auction is a auction game using a traditional deck of cards. The front side of the cards represents the valued amount of the goods. The back of the cards represents coins used to purchase the goods. Players will purchase goods on the auction block.

Players will take turns buying goods that are being auctioned off. As items are sold, goods move down the line and go down in value. The shrewd purchasing agent will buy as low as possible. When the last card is drawn, the game will come to a close. Players will count their goods by their value and the one with the most valued goods in their possession wins the game.

—description from the designer

Yumi and Tomu are trapped in the Gamemaster's dungeon with their friends Jeff and Mumbi. In order to be free again, you must pass different challenges ranging from singing or dancing to writing as many names as possible starting with the letter 'a'. Fore some of the challenges you'll use a 20 seconds timer.

On your turn, you draw a random token to see if you'll get the possibility to walk 1, 2 or -1 steps towards the goal. Then you draw a card from the deck corresponding to the token. Lastly you roll a die to determine what challenge on the card to do.

From the Gamemaster's dungeon, the friends move from room to room by completing the challenges. Whoever reaches the rainbow on the green meadow first wins the game.

Both teams blindfold one player, and then they compete to scoop the most pancakes or waffle cards onto their plate before the time runs out. Talking is encouraged, and the other team members can give directions to help their player scoop up cards and avoid the dreaded Doom card, which causes your team to lose the round immediately. Special Food Fighter cards give your team advantages, such as allowing a teammate to use their arm as a backstop for the spatula, or making the opposing player smack themselves on the head with the spatula after every scoop.

The march of technology across BattleTech’s eras is relentless—but some war machines never die. This PDF-only series includes brand-new BattleMechs and OmniMechs, alongside Classic ’Mechs and combat vehicles from both the Inner Sphere and the Clans rebuilt with the latest technology to keep them competitive on modern battlefields. This series also includes in-universe development notes, battle histories, notable pilots, and record sheets for each unit.

Embark on an enchanting adventure in 3 Magi, a captivating game that follows the three wise men on their legendary trek across the desert to meet the newborn King. 3 Magi offers a unique gaming experience, weaving together elements of resource management, worker placement, card hand management and crafting. Immerse yourself in the timeless narrative of the 3 Magi as they seek Jesus the King.

Players assume the roles of the Magi. Manage resources, skillfully craft gifts, navigate the terrain with the help of the navigation board and encounter characters that may aid the Magi's mission.

As the Magi, players must gather and combine resources to craft gifts for the King, each worth victory points. Players travel across desert tiles, entering iconic locations such as “Jericho", "Jerusalem", "Herod's Palace" and "Bethlehem". The tiles have unique actions allowing players to choose a particular route and resolve actions. Use the navigation board for bonuses & extra actions. Manage & combine your cards on hand to further your Magi in the game.

Once a caravan makes it to Bethlehem, the fame ends and points are totaled.  The player with the most points wins.

—description from the publisher

It will contain a set of more complicated card events/actions (16) like Hostile Takeovers, Aquisitions, Stock Splits & Rich or Ruin - Players Choice cards.  It will also have new token and set of dice collectors items.  The new cards will introduce a new level of strategy and depth to Market Mayhem. You can integrate these new elements with existing content strategically or deploy them all at once for a fully refreshed gaming experience.

You are office workers of a certain political party who have been summoned by a reporter. He gets paid if he provides juicy material courtesy of your gossip — but if the article is widely reported and your role in its creation comes out, the responsibility that awaits you is...being fired! You absolutely do not want to leave the political party and need to make somewhat unconventional arrangements, perhaps kicking down your colleagues instead.

Gossip Trip Trix is a trick-taking game in which you want to avoid points, that is, credit for the gossip being spread. The deck consists of four suits numbered 1-11. Lay the 8s in a vertical column on the table as pat of an imaginary grid, then shuffle and deal the remaining cards.

The lead player plays what they want, and each player must follow suit, if possible; otherwise, they play what they wish. The highest card of the lead suit wins the trick, then all played cards are placed into the grid in the appropriate places: 1-7 to the left of the 8 of the matching color, and 9-11 to the right. Whoever won the trick scores points equal to the longest run of consecutive numbers from 1-7 in the winning suit, then they lead the next trick. However, if the 9-10-11 of a color have been played, then tricks won in this color are worth 0 points.

Once the 9-10-11 of each color have been played, the round ends. Shuffle the cards, then start a new round. After each player has been start player once, the game ends, and whoever has the fewest points wins.

TEVolution is a trick-taking game played with 16 cards.

After that, starting with the person who played the weakest card, each player chooses one card from the remaining cards on the field and puts it into their hand. The person who gets 4 tricks is the winner.

boardgame: ペンギンの消えた足跡 (Pengin No Kieta Ashiato)
description:
The 21 penguins are now 20. Which one is the missing one?

If you organize the information about the children who are present, you may be able to find out the children who have disappeared.

Play cards according as a trick-taking game and guess the number of the child who disappeared from the numbers that gradually appear, and guess the number!

ペンギンの消えた足跡 is a trick-taking deduction game with only 21 cards.

boardgame: Ebb & Flow: The Final Communist Offensive in Korea, 22 April-10 June 1951
description:
Ebb & Flow (e&f) covers the last period of the Korean War that was characterized by mobile operations. The game begins with the launching of what turned out to be the last of the Communist strategic-level offensives of the whole war, and ends with the final UN riposte against it. The game therefore requires both players to successfully attack and defend over the course of the game.

Scale. each hex on the map equals 5 miles (8 km) from side to opposite side. each game turn represents 3.5 days (hence the date-overlaps on the Turn Track). Individual playing pieces represent corps, divisions, brigades, regiments and battalions, each containing from about 2,000 to 15,000 men and/or 50 to 400 armored fighting vehicles respectively.
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups
family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

description:
A ring toss game themed to Disney's "Frozen" franchise, complete with Olaf headbands as targets!

In this action ring toss game, players wear an Olaf headband and try to catch as many snowflakes as possible on Olaf’s twig.

Includes: 2 Olaf Headbands, 6 Snowflake Rings, 1 Instruction Sheet

Highscorer 1986 is a solo game for 3 to 99 players, where one player is playing a simulated slot machine set collection game and the other players are betting on the results.  The game includes a score card which resembles the high score screen of a vintage arcade game to record the slot machine player's score; this player wins if they set the high score.  The betting players are competing against each other for the high score.

The game lasts 4 rounds. In the first 3 rounds, the betting players have a limited number of bets to place on how many of each of 8 symbols will be in the slot machine player's collection at the end of the 4th round.

The slot machine player is revealing cards from a deck, and choosing to either take the highest ranked card, the lowest 2 ranked cards, or roll dice and attempt to take all cards.

Groven is based on each player playing as a village blacksmith. Players must craft items using resources they gather from expeditions to complete local jobs to gain respect from the village. The player to first reach 5 respect wins and is crowned the most respected blacksmith of the village.

The game sees players carrying out certain actions each turn around the table until each player has exhausted all of their available "time" tokens, the primary resource of the game. When all time tokens are spent, the game moves to the next round, or "days" as they are called in-game. Each day has a specific event that happens, either the job bulletin gets refreshed so players can get new jobs, or the traveling merchant opens up so that players can trade their crafted items from their forge for money. On the seventh day players may earn up to 1 respect if they win the smithing tourney, which is dictated by some dice rolls.

Players alternate between gathering resources by going on "expeditions" underground, managing their resources either by selling them at certain events or using them to craft items at their forge, combating monster underground or bandits on the surface, or building buildings that offer communal benefits to all players, but give respect to the one who built it. Players keep deciding on what actions to carry out to try and be the first to get 5 respect.

—description from the designer

Yaburo Quest is a game for at least two players in which you tear a sheet of paper into tiny pieces to represent your attempts to defeat the monster of the current round. For instance, you may have a goal card that shows purple bows and arrows and a purple monster. You score points if you tear off a piece of paper that has exactly one such weapon and one such monster — and more points if it has one such weapon and two monsters.

Players tearing their sheet at the same time during a two-minute round, and they get only one sheet of paper to use over four rounds.

On the back of the sheet are treasures, coins, and ghosts that can provide positive or negative points. Try not to rip them when you're focusing on the front of the paper.

The player with the most points after four rounds wins.

Maze Makers is a game where players add walls and treasures to other players' mazes.  Once the mazes are ready, they are, one at a time, taped to the table and a large piece of paper with a small hole is placed over the entrance to the maze.  The active player then uses their marker to draw their way through the maze, moving the aperture of the large piece of paper as they do so.

Players have 1 minute to complete their maze. They gain points for finding the other players treasures and returning home; they lose points if their marker path runs into any walls. Players can also gain points for having treasure on other players' mazes go unclaimed.

The person with the most points wins.

A small game that requires only 5 tricks. As the name suggests, it's a game that combines trick-taking and werewolf.

Players will be divided into werewolves and students and compete against each other. For each trick in trick-taking, the winner of the trick will nominate someone they think is a werewolf and banish them.

If the werewolf can be expelled, the students win but if the werewolf survives at the end of 5 tricks, the werewolf wins.
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

boardgame: Murder Party: Blutige Kreuzfahrt auf dem Nil
description:
Liven up a party with friends with this murder mystery party game that will accompany you through an evening or even a whole weekend!

A murder is committed during a cruise on the Nile. The only possible culprits are the surviving passengers - or could a member of the crew be behind it? Now it's up to you to solve the case. Collect clues that could help you. To do this, however, you'll have to eliminate the other sleuths by enticing unknowing players to complete certain secret tasks for you!

6 different cases can be played! The scenarios can be played several times as no cards need to be folded or coloured. However, there is only one solution per story.

boardgame: Escape Game: Baker Street – Das Vermächtnis von Sherlock Holmes
description:
It seems Sherlock needs your help to solve the ever-increasing number of crimes in London. Solve the mysteries, scour 19th century London and amaze the world's most famous private detective...

Contents:

     Puzzle maps to explore Hyde Park, the Crystal Palace, Kensington Gardens and even the Albert Hall
     Clue cards to progress and solve the crime
     a poster to identify the guilty person!


Playable (almost) ad infinitum! Around 30 puzzles which, depending on the combination, can lead to more than 50 possible culprits.

boardgame: Escape Game: Der Schatz der Templer
description:
900 years after the founding of the Order of the Knights Templar in 1129, a notebook is found in Midlothian, Scotland. It was written by Georges de Laprée, one of the last knights of the order, and begins with the following words: "Rosslyn, 1341, I, Georges de Laprée, have travelled the world to protect the treasure of the Templars from envious and wicked men, according to the orders I received at the beginning of the year 1307. It is neither a lie nor excessive pride to write here that the treasure cannot be recovered by anyone other than a knight of the Order."

It is your task to find the Templar treasure before it falls into the wrong hands. Your search begins in Jerusalem. Good luck!

Memory with cards that glow in the dark and an extra card that forces a player to shuffle all cards during a game when revealed.
Fun for kids from the age of 3 or 4 onwards, but also for adults.

You've seen the TV show, now become a part of it. ("Let's Dance" is the German version of Strictly / DWTS) Get as many points as possible to become Dancing Star. You can gain points in six categories, e.g. by performing dances (solo or as couple; judged by the other players), or by answering trivia questions. Best two players battle in the final, best of five.
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description:
Attract is a 2P game in which you battle over control of 5 areas. In the basic game, you want to win control of 3 of the areas; in the alternate rules, the areas are worth a certain point value and you want to win control of more points.

The general outline of the game play is the same in both situations. Chips numbered 1 to 4 in three colors are shuffled and placed face down on a tile. On your turn, either take a chip and place it on a vertices between two cards on your side (or either end) or look at two chips on the tile and put one of them back face up.

The game ends when both players have placed 12 chips on their side.
publishers: Banjo Yugi Seisakujo BGM (盤上遊戯製作所 BGM)

description:
Fano Trick consists of 8 rules cards which, according to the rules, form the "smallest finite projective plane". In essence, each rule card lists several possible victory conditions for a player (e.g. win 0 tricks, win at least 1 trick and don't collect 4 suits.)

Players are dealt two such cards and pass one face up to their clockwise neighbor. Each player's goal is the common rule between the card they were passed and the card they kept.

The trick-taking is standard must follow.

The winner(s) are the players that achieve their goal.

The expansion completely changes the style of how the game is played. It introduces roles with side quests and also units of inattention. Naturally, there are new "Pimpulové," travelers, and reaction cards.

Red Labyrinth is a horror-themed trick-taking game. Each player must move towards the exit while following their memories. However, if you stay in this labyrinth for a long time, your emotional ups and downs will be intense, your memories will gradually fade, and your path will become complicated. Additionally, a presence lurking in the darkness will slowly approach you. Once you are caught by that presence, you will never be able to escape from here. Will you be able to avoid it and escape from here?

Summon Legends is a casual and enjoyable trick-taking style game where you fight using magic cards and monster cards.

Use magic cards to control the battlefield and advance the battle to your advantage. The first player to run out of cards wins that round. The winner of each round will advance to the next round with one legendary card and the player who wins the final round (4th round) is the winner of the game.
publishers: あんきろわーくす (Ankilo Works)

description:
AUKUS & CHINA is 2-5 player, easy to learn hard to master, asymmetric modern-day strategy wargame. Area control meets hidden resource allocation and open-choice deck building. A&C explores the fictional scenario of an escalating conflict between the USA and China and their allies.

You and your friends are the leaders of one of 5 teams on 2 sides. Red side teams: China and Russia. Blue side teams: USA, UK-AUS-FRA, JPN-KOR. 
Your goal in the game is to drive down the enemy side’s morale points. Morale points represent the public’s political willingness and economic ability to continue to support the government’s war efforts. Allies will win or lose together. You can drive down the other side’s morale points by controlling sea and land areas, and winning battles.

Mechanics that Make AUKUS & CHINA Unique:

     Asymmetric Gameplay: Asymmetry plays a central role across all aspects of the game, manifesting on both side-specific and team-specific levels. This asymmetry ranges from resource availability and unit deployment to strategic options and unit-specific abilities. We refer to this as 'layered asymmetry,' which simplifies the learning curve for new players, as they don't need to immediately grasp multiple unique playstyles. Instead, they can gradually understand and adapt to the nuances of each level, making it easier to think strategically and empathize with different player perspectives. Simultaneously, it offers seasoned players a thrilling challenge to put themselves in their opponents' shoes, deepening the strategic complexity and excitement of the game.
     Unit special abilities: Unit special abilities are the most prominent aspect of the game's asymmetry. These abilities allow players to strategically outmaneuver and even overpower larger forces with smaller ones by using the right combination of units and their unique powers. This depth of strategic options, stemming from the diverse abilities of each unit, provides unmatched variety and replayability. 
     Permadeath: Units are in limited supply. Units destroyed in combat are permanently removed and placed in the destroyed section of a team's tray, with some exceptions.
     Catch up: We call it 'Rallying Call'—a game mechanism that allows players to use their setbacks as a catalyst to redouble their efforts in combat. It supports the trailing side by effectively preventing any player from gaining an insurmountable lead, thereby maintaining a competitive and challenging gameplay environment.
     Hidden resource allocation at both macro and micro levels: You secretly manage your resources across three main powers: Mobilization power for deploying new units, Operational power for moving units, and Intel power for using unit special abilities, tactics, and cyber warfare. Plus, you use special abilities in combat covertly.
     Escalation dynamics: The game unfolds over five escalation phases, introducing new units, combat zones, and events, making it progressively engaging. This structure is ideal for beginners to learn at their own pace and for seasoned players to strategically build their approach, while also ensuring that early mistakes don't immediately jeopardize the game, allowing for a more forgiving and fun experience.


The story of AUKUS & CHINA:
It's the second decade of the third millennium. The Indo-Pacific has become the core of the global economy, fueling the unprecedented growth of China, positioning it as a rival to the United States. In response, the USA and its allies have announced the AUKUS security pact to contain the expansion of China, which aims to displace the US as the world’s pre-eminent power. Finding itself increasingly isolated, China has strengthened its alliance with Russia, united by their belief that the current international arrangements give the US too much power and their determination to change that and to create a new world order, where new institutions, ideas and power structures will better accommodate their interests. The board is set, the pieces are moving. It's your turn to shape the outcome of the great conflict of our time.

We have put considerable effort into ensuring geographical and military accuracy, in proportion to the game's level of abstraction.

—description from the designer

Potluck Showdown is a strategic tabletop card game that combines engaging, addictive gameplay with an appreciation for delicious Asian cuisine.

The game is easy to learn, but difficult to master. Each player starts with a hand of recipe cards and must collect completed sets (i.e. 1 food, 1 drink and 1 snack) to acquire points and win. But, as you play, watch out for the action and disaster cards that can wreak havoc on your culinary creations.

With over 30 diverse Asian foods represented, there's plenty of variety to keep the game fresh and exciting. Plus, the adorable artwork on each card will make you smile no matter the occasion.

Enter the Crime Scene… A frighteningly ordinary crime brings detectives to the financial center of Tokyo, but everything is not what it seems. Here, true power resides in the shadows.

Once you start your investigation, your life’s on the line.
Can you bring the truth to light before it’s too late?

October 5, 1976, East Berlin, Germany.
You are drawn into a web of espionage and intrigue on the East side of the Wall. Assume another identity and try to make your way to the other side. By cracking the codes, it can be done!

Enter the Crime Scene… A young woman, living in the shadow
of the Berlin Wall, receives a strange, dangerous letter that
changes her life… and maybe more than that.

June 5, 2023, Silicon Valley, California.
You are accused of a terrible crime and have to prove your innocence. Dig deep to find out who framed you. Can you do it before you are caught and convicted?

Enter the Crime Scene… An invisible hand creates a disaster that falls on an unsuspecting man. Can he fight the cyber monster that is threatening to destroy his life – and those of others – or will he lose everything?

boardgame: Le Seigneur des Anneaux: La Quête de l'Anneau
description:
As Frodo, Aragorn, Gimli or Legolas, try to destroy the One Ring! With the cards you have in hand and the new cards drawn throughout the game, you will have to thwart obstacles and enemies. It will be essential to cooperate to continue your journey and get closer to your goal: Mordor and the freedom of Middle-earth!

Partez à l’aventure en incarnant Frodon, Aragorn, Gimli ou Legolas avec l’aide de Gandalf, Sam ou Boromir et prenez la route du Mordor pour essayer de détruire l’Anneau !
Depuis la maison de Bilbon, affrontez les dangers et progressez jusqu’à la Montagne du Destin pour enfin débarrasser le monde du maléfique Anneau unique. Avec les cartes que vous avez en main et les nouvelles cartes piochées tout au long de la partie, vous devrez déjouer les obstacles et les ennemis. Il sera indispensable de coopérer pour continuer votre route et vous rapprocher de votre but : le Mordor et la liberté de la Terre du Milieu !

In Dizzle: Christmas, players fill their level sheets with dice collected each round. Players take turns selecting dice from the center of the table, and the next die they collect must connect to the others. At the end of a round, players remove the collected dice and cross out those squares.

This might sound simple, but of course others will compete for the dice you need....

Can you decorate the Christmas tree (and collect ornaments, candy canes, and presents) to best prepare for Christmas Day?

—description from the designer

In LasseMajas Deckarkortspel your goal is to be the first one to solve your crime by collecting cards and adding clues.

After dealing 4 cards to each player, players take turns asking one other player if they have a card matching one in their hand. If a player has the requested card type, they surrender them all to the asking player, and the asking player can then continue asking for a type of card from either the same player or different one. If a player doesn't have the card requested, he says 'På uppdrag' and the asking player then draws from a draw pile.

Once you collect 3 cards of the same type you earn the first of 3 clues. When collecting clues you need to find the 3 matching clues from the same series giving the player a complete narrative of the crime.

Whoever finds all 3 clues first has solved the crime and wins the game.

Worlds of fantasy, science fiction, and horror collide in Ultimate Dungeon Showdown, the game where heroes and villains from across reality must work together to win glory for you in the Dungeoneer's Guild combat arena.

Play as members of the Dungeoneering Guild, recruiting an adventuring party from across the multiverse to fight and win the title of Ultimate Dungeon Champion.

This fast-paced party game for 2-6 players includes optional rules for strategic deck-building, tournaments, and advanced adventuring scenarios. Part of the Ultimate Dungeon Game System!

An Escape Room in an Envelope! A dinner party game.

While James was travelling through China, he made a devastating and embarrassing mistake. He sent a very private message to the wrong people and he’s in big trouble if this gets out.

How to play: Solve all nine puzzles to reveal the passcode to the online vault, break into the vault where the files are hidden and delete them all before it’s too late!

—description from the publisher

120 activities, challenges and ideas for original dates as a couple. Create unforgettable moments together. The first to complete 5 challenges wins.

Choose, scratch and... let the adventure begin!

Get ready to live fun, original and memorable moments!

boardgame: Oscacomp's Item Shop: a party game for people who like dungeons, dragons, and grammar.
description:
The players are associate salesgnomes at Lord Oscacomp's Adventuring Outfitters and Item Emporium (or, as it's more commonly known, Oscacomp's Item Shop). You have three jobs: sell, sell, sell!

On your turn, play an adjective from your hand to the left of the other cards in play. It has to be a higher rank than the leftmost card (this keeps things in grammatical order). Then read aloud the entire item description. This is very important.

If you don't have a card of higher rank, you might be able to play one of your special cards instead. The AND card lets you play a second adjective of the same rank as one already on the board; the CARET lets you insert an adjective between two ranks, and the F-BOMB, well, you can play that one anywhere.

If you can't play at all, the round is over. The last person who played a card wins the round and gets 1 point per adjective in play. First person to 20 Osca-bucks wins.

—description from the publisher

Originally on the 9-card nanogame contest of 2022, this is a Solo game where the player need to solve investigations, allocating dice in the Investigation Slots and manipulating them using Items, to get Clues and closing the portals.
It's a free PnP game, that can be played using only 9 cards a few other components. After the content, 3 more cards were added to give more replayability to the game.

—description from the designer

Four pieces are thoughtfully placed to make a cube identical to the subject. Although each piece is flat, the finished product is three-dimensional. The result is a challenging puzzle. There are 30 problems in total. There is also a rule that the first person to solve a puzzle wins.

4枚のカードを上手に重ねて、お題と同じキューブを作る。
1枚のカードは平面なのに、出来上がりは立体的。
だんだん脳が混乱してくる不思議なパズル。
問題数は全部で30問。早い者勝ちの対戦ルールもあり。

Madori-ism is a card game that creates Madori (floor plans) by stacking cards and connecting them.
Increase your favorite equipment and erase unnecessary equipment by stacking cards to aim for your ideal Madori.
The card game that creates Madori has become Madori-ism+ and is even more powerful!
New ways to play, such as resident markers to protect equipment and cooperative mode, will further expand your excitement!

The unofficial game for Middle-earth fans
Are you familiar with the legendary world of hobbits, orcs and elves? Then take on the ultimate challenge and face the 222 tricky quiz questions about the content from J.R.R. Tolkien's books. You can choose between two different levels of difficulty as you puzzle your way through the realm of the most famous and extensive fantasy epic in literary history. Look forward to an adventurous quiz and expand your Tolkien knowledge in a playful way.

—description from the designer

Whispers of a legendary treasure echo through the chilling mists of the northern seas, a prize so exquisite it evades even the gaze of the gods. They call it the Dreadheart, a crystallized Titan's heart born of love's lament. Forged in agony, it promises immense wealth, power, and... a gnawing torment to its possessor.

The Dreadheart is a solo game with 18 cards in the In-Hand style. In this game, you will take command of Black Mamba or Lone Conqueror, pirate and adventurer ships, in search of an old treasure, The Dreadheart. During your journey, you will have to manage resources to explore regions and discover clues that will lead you to the treasure's whereabouts, and you will also face sinister creatures and the fury of nature.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: シン・ネコ物件 (Shin Neko Bukken)
description:
シン・ネコ物件 (Shin Neko Bukken) is a press your luck racing game from Japan with a cat and horror theme. The game is published in a DVD box, and the subtitle of the game is デレない間取り (Derenai Madori). In the game, players are trying to escape a house haunted by a ghost cat. If the player stops to pay with the cat, they get a better chance of escaping.

The game has an advanced set of rules using 10 tool cards, which are various cat toys to distract the ghost cat. And the game has a basic set of rules for an easier, faster game too.

The publisher says:
This is a press your luck racing roll & move game in which you advance by throwing chips. You have to get out of a cursed house where a ghost cat is playing with you!

When it is your turn, choose whether you want to 'run' or 'play'. If you want to run, you throw three sound chips. The sound chips have footprints written on their surface, and you can advance your piece up to the number of footprints you have made. If you advance successfully, you can continue throwing chips.

However, if two or more cats on the back of the chip appear, you are out. The ghost cat will find you. If the ghost cat finds you, you will be taken back to the cat tower in the middle of the house, and you will be far from the goal.

If you choose to play with the cat, you end your turn by turning over your piece. The person whose piece is turned over plays with the cat and is liked, and can change the front or back of one of the chips they throw once. You have a simple but important choice to make: run through the game or play to the cat's good mood.

チップを振って進むチキンレースすごろくゲームです。

手番が来たら「走る」か「遊ぶ」かを選択します。走るなら物音チップを3枚振ります。
物音チップには表面に足跡が書かれており、出た足跡の数までコマを進められます。
無事進めたら、続けてチップを振り続けることができます。

ただし、チップの裏面に描かれたネコが２枚以上出たらアウト。幽霊ネコに見つかってしまいます。見つかったらコースの途中のネコタワーまで連れて戻ることになり、ゴールから遠のいてしまいます。

遊ぶを選択した場合は、自分のコマを裏返してターンを終えます。コマが裏になっている人はネコと遊んで気に入られているので、1回だけ自分が振ったチップ1枚の表裏を変えることができます。駆け抜けるか、猫の機嫌を取るか、シンプルながら選択を迫られます、
--description by publisher

パンダチン (Pandatin) is a fast word game from Japan, in which players try to avoid saying a rude word.

The publisher says:

A forbidden card game in which you lose if you say 'ding' in succession. You have two cards in your hand, which can only be of the three types "Pan", "Da" and "Chin", and you have to play one card in your hand on top of the card on the field, and read aloud the card that was on the bottom and the card that was on top. If you say Chin when it is out, you lose. It's not good Japanese to say Chin twice in a row.

連続で「チン」と言ったら負けという禁断のカードゲーム。「パン」「ダ」「チン」の3種類しかないカードを手札として2枚持ち、場に出てるカードの上に手札を1枚重ねて出し、下にあったカードと上に重ねたカードの2枚を音読するだけ。チンが出てる時にチンを出したら負け。チンを続けて2回言うのは日本語的に良くないぞ。
--description by publisher

boardgame: Complete Murder Mystery: Carefully crafted in Paris
description:
Players assume the character of one of 6-8 people. Over the course of the gathering, the players must mingle, converse, and consequently determine who is the murderer.

Each player is given a list of 6 statements that must be made during the game. These statements should lead the best investigator to the guilty party.

Presented in a classy whiskey-style gift box and includes six different plots, depending on the murderer's identity.

Play to determine what your fortune will be in Fortune Cookies, the mystical game of tempting fate from Ridley's. On a plate in front of you sit 12 Fortune Cookies. Many are unfortunate, but some predict great things. Use magic scrolls to strategically change your fate, but other players can influence it, too! Will you end up with good fortune, or does your future involve being injured playing leapfrog with a unicorn? Use your actions wisely to grab a good fortune and bluff your opponents to make sure they don't!

—description from the publisher

アフター・ザ・ダンジョン (After The Dungeon) is a dungeon escape game from Japan. The box front artwork was created using an AI system Leonardo.ai and then modified by the illustrator Natane (なたね).

The publisher says:

Players take the role of a group of adventurers who have defeated a boss and are trying to escape from a collapsing dungeon, while collecting requested items. The game has a total of eight rounds.

On your turn, you play a card from the field or discard a card to advance your piece. If players stop at the same square, your pieces chain together and move to the next row. Based on the pieces you advance, you also get a chance to advance pieces on your individual sheet. Collecting gem pieces along the way is also an important source of points.

After eight rounds, the player with the highest score wins by adding up the score based on the rank of the pieces advanced, the score on the individual sheet and the gemstone bonus.

This is a medium-weight game that is easy and light to do on your turn, but offers a puzzle-like play experience that requires careful thought.

プレイヤーはボスを倒した冒険者一行となり、崩壊するダンジョンから依頼品を集めつつ脱出を目指します。ゲームは全8ラウンドです。

手番では場から1枚カードを出すか、捨て札にして自分の駒を進めます。
同じマスで止まると駒が連鎖して隣の列に移動していきます。
自分が進めた駒を元に、個人シート上でも駒を進めるチャンスが得られます。
また、道中で宝石駒を集めるのも重要な得点源になります。

8ラウンドの後に、駒を進めた順位に応じた得点、個人シート上での得点、宝石ボーナスを足して最も得点の多いプレイヤーが勝利します。
手番でやることは簡単で軽快ながら、じっくり考えて遊べるパズルチックなプレイ感が楽しめる中量級ゲームです。
--description by publisher
publishers: Ferret Games Factory (フェレットゲームズファクトリー)

description:
Last night, your village was undermined by an authoritarian state. Some villagers had time to flee into the hills, others are imprisoned in the village. Luckily, you, the local child, are a mine-clearer. Your objective is to save the twelve villagers.

The Village is a single-player game halfway between Solitaire and Minesweeper. It's played with a traditional pack of cards in ~5 minute games. Deduction and risk-taking will be your best allies.

---

Cette nuit, votre village a été miné par un état autoritaire. Certains villageois ont eu le temps de fuir dans les collines, d’autres sont emprisonnés dans le village. Par chance, vous, l’Enfant du Pays, êtes démineur. Votre objectif est de sauver les douze villageois.

Le Village est un jeu solo à mi-chemin entre le Solitaire et le Démineur. Il se joue avec un jeu de cartes traditionnelles pour des parties de ~5min. Déduction et prise de risque seront vos meilleurs alliés.

boardgame: Tightrope: A Balance & Blocking Strategy Game
description:
Players will flip for Tightrope, the simple yet intense strategy board game!

Players take turns placing marbles on rubber bands that sway and bounce. But be careful, if you don't find a fair spot for your marbles, they may fall off the tightrope and right back into your pile. The first person to place all their marbles wins.

—description from the publisher

‘What’s That One’ is a party trivia game where you must identify the movies, shows, characters, bands, artists, and games based on poor, silly, or ridiculous descriptions. There are 3 questions and 4 hints per card to help you figure it out. The fewer hints you need, the more points you’ll get and the faster you can win!

MIG Take Away – Familjekul is a trivia game using the same rules as Mini-MIG and containing over 350 questions for all ages.

—user summary

MIG Take Away – Familjekul är ett superroligt frågespel fyllt med en härlig blandning av frågor. Vissa har samma ämne, fast med olika svårighetsnivå för barn och vuxna. Ibland får alla, oavsett ålder, samma fråga. Och i många frågor finns svarsalternativ för de yngre barnen. Alla i familjen har kul! Spelet är perfekt för mys på semestern och frågorna lockar till massor av skratt.

—description from the publisher

1789年に始まるフランス革命を、ボードを併用したキャラクター・カードゲームで再現。キャラクターは、マリー・アントワネット、ロベスピエール、ナポレオン・ポナパルト、タレーラン、フーシェなどフランス革命期に活躍した歴史上有名人物が３２枚のカードで総登場。
各派・各人物の思惑渦巻く過激にして混沌としたフランス革命の情勢を描いた、マルチプレー政略ゲームの傑作！


Recreates the French Revolution that began in 1789 and is a character card game using a board.
Characters include Marie Antoinette, Robespierre, Napoléon Bonaparte, Talleyrand, Fouché, and other famous historical figures who were active during the French Revolution, appearing on 32 cards.
Each player bids on those characters that appear every turn, and aims to win by the actions of the characters belonging to their faction.The unique feature is that the political system is decided by vote each turn. Actions then differs depending on the turn political system. For example, in an Absolute or Constitutional Monarchy, players can only vote, appease the aristocrats, and campaign in local areas, but in a Republic they can select radical actions such as arrest and execution, which expands the game at once.
In addition, characters who have been arrested can be freed with the "exile" action, however exiled characters cannot score except when foreign troops invade France. Therefore they will try to guide them through "military operations".

A multiplayer political game that depicts the radical and chaotic situation of the French Revolution, with its various factions and personalities.

Contents:
48 deluxe double-sided color cards (3 sheets)
192 counters
1 standard half map

Game period: 1789-1795
Area: Within France
Play time:      2-3 hours
Number of players: 2-5 people
Difficulty level (5 levels, 5 is the highest): 2

(translated and adapted from publisher's website)

boardgame: Tapestry: Revised, Adjusted, Rebalanced Civilization Pack
description:
Ever since Tapestry’s release in 2019, we have gathered/analyzed tens of thousands of data points and listened to Tapestry fans around the world–including in an extensive thread on BoardGameGeek–in an effort to ensure that every Tapestry civilization is as balanced, fun, and intuitive as it can possibly be, whether they’re in the hands of new or experienced Tapestry players.

The result is this pack of revised, adjusted, rebalanced civilization mats from the core game and first two expansions (31 civ mats, plus 2 slightly revised capital city mats). We’ve also included a comprehensive landmark guide and added complexity ratings to all civilizations.

Matching +: Match & More is the ultimate memory game for at-home or on-the-go. The set features new ways to match - including sequence games, match 3 games, and press your luck, aside from classic play. All 40 different themed cards store easily on the case. How fast can you make a match?

This mini-expansion features four great game-play additions, packed with tiles and tokens. Each mode in interchangeable, so you can add one at a time, or all three at once! Also included you’ll find 3 new vehicles!

Mode #1: Rough Roads Ahead - Moving across Atlantis just got harsher! Each time the Storm moves to a new site, all adjoining white paths (not ports) gain a Hazard Marker.

Mode #2: Deadly Contracts - Reavers have attacked our beloved Stormholds. Fortunately our allies managed to get word out before it was too late. Fulfilling these Contracts can only be achieved using Weaponry.

Mode #3: Atlantean Elixir - The days are long, and the nights, longer. Carrying a flask of Atlantean Elixir can come in handy when you need a little extra pick-me-up. Give each player 1 Atlantean Elixir during Setup. Players can turn over their Atlantean Elixir Token and lose 1 Health to take any 1 Resource from their site.

New Vehicles - x1 Trike, x1 Plane, x1 Sub; all with unique abilities.

—description from the publisher;;

As a Migo, also known as a Yeti by some, you love to decorate your cave with goodies taken from the mountain explorers that you eat — and thankfully no matter how many you eat, that supply doesn't stop!
