In the game we will have to put stairs ones in top of the other trying not to destroy the structure. To have more emotion a dice will indicate how to put new stairs! A skill game to play with the whole family.

boardgame: Beyond The Edges of The Maps
description:
Beyond The Edges of The Maps is a two-player territory exploration game inspired by the fictional world of The Wingfeather Saga by Andrew Peterson. Players sail their ships and explore land in order to surround and discover more territory than their opponent.

Each turn, a player moves their ship to discover more land and also adds more land pieces to represent exploring uncharted territory. While players take turns moving and adding land pieces to the board, each player will try to discover more territory and overtake their opponent, eventually surrounding their opponent and claiming victory.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Enquêtes Express: Dans l'ombre de Peter
description:
Neverland, the land where you never grow up, is in turmoil: Peter Pan has been missing for several days... In this fast-paced investigation, let's discover together the key to this mystery and all those who surround it!

During a game, players first read and observe as many cards as possible within a limited time. However, each player is forbidden to look at cards of his or her own color. Then, together, they take the time they need to share and cross-check their information to answer a series of plot-related questions. The more correct the answers, the higher the rank of investigator.

—description from the publisher

Neverland, le pays imaginaire, est en émoi : Peter Pan a disparu depuis plusieurs jours... Dans cette nouvelle enquête express, découvrez ensemble la clé de ce mystère et de tous ceux qui l'entourent !

Pour chaque enquête, d'abord les joueurs lisent et observent un maximum de cartes dans un temps limité. Il est toutefois interdit, pour chaque joueur, de consulter les cartes de sa couleur interdite. Puis ils prennent ensemble le temps nécessaire pour partager et recouper leurs infos afin de répondre à une série de questions autour de l'intrigue. Plus ils accumulent les bonnes réponses, plus ils accèdent à un rang d'enquêteur élevé.

—description from the publisher (French)
family: Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Peter Pan

boardgame: Fallout: Wasteland Warfare – Institute Core Box
description:
The Institute are an enigma to most in the Wasteland – are they the synthetic future of humankind, or robotic bogeymen waiting to replace you when you sleep? Few ever find out the true nature of this shadowy organisation, and fewer still live to tell the tale.

What is known is that the Institute utilise the highest levels of technology to achieve their aims, and even have the power to emulate humans exactly. With stiletto sharp precision they infiltrate and eradicate high value targets. With force of numbers they can overwhelm strongpoints with waves of Gen 1 synths. They are the everywhere and nowhere, and paranoia follows in their wake.

This boxed set contains eight 32mm scale multi-part high quality resin Institute miniatures, each with unique scenic bases, to allow players to expand their Fallout: Wasteland Warfare games.

Contents:

4x gen 1 Synths
    2x gen 2 Synths
    1x Institute Scientist
    1x Institute Courser

NOTE: Players will need the Institute Wave Card Expansion Pack to use the contents of this box. The pack can be DL for free from Modiphius.

boardgame: Fallout: Wasteland Warfare – The Commonwealth Rules
description:
Welcome to the Commonwealth, the largest expansion yet for Fallout: Wasteland Warfare! It’s packed with new rules, cards, guides, and scenarios to bring more factions and units to your tabletop.

The Commonwealth spans the rolling hills and scorched forests of the north to the broken coast and its rusting industry in the east. It sweeps through the decaying urban sprawl of Boston and out into the irradiated wasteland of the glowing sea.

The Commonwealth is home to a wide variety of groups, new factions, and additions to existing factions, including:

The Gunners are the most organised mercenary group in the Commonwealth, and they’ve garnered a reputation as bloodthirsty, unscrupulous fighters. They claim to be soldiers for hire, but much of the Commonwealth views them as little better than raiders, a militarized gang of thugs with delusions of grandeur.

The secretive Railroad fight to protect synths and attempt to spirit them away from the Institute, who the Railroad view as nothing more than slavers. Synths, to the Railroad, are the equal of humans and deserve to live freely.

RobCo is responsible for many of the Robots encountered throughout the Wasteland. From ruggedly built and hard-working Protectrons to the various military and medical support models of Mr Handy, you are never far from the chirpy robotic voices of these indispensable metallic helpers.

The Wasteland itself is home to all manner of irradiated Creatures. All the fauna, from domesticated livestock to roaming packs of fierce predators bring risk to any unwary traveller.

This expansion contains new rules for clashes within the Commonwealth, 171 punch-out cards, and an array of new scenarios both linked and standalone featuring the denizens of this varied area. Also included are strategy guides and painting guides to help you get your models ready for battle in the post-apocalyptic world of Fallout.

Contents:

A 65-page booklet with rules for expanding your wasteland denizens, including the Children of the Atom, the Gunners, the Railroad, new Creatures, and the Super Mutant’s terrifying Behemoth, Swan.
    171 new cards: 35 unit and 33 AI cards, 1 equipment card, 16 leader cards, 5 mod cards, 17 perk cards, 3 power armor cards, 14 quest cards, 5 reference cards, 42 weapon cards
    Painting guides for Survivors, the Brotherhood of Steel, and Super Mutants. A gallery of painted models featuring every release in the Commonwealth wave.
    Scenarios for playing in the Commonwealth. Rules for Wasteland Warfare terrain. Unique region rules for locations within the Commonwealth. Strategy guides for playing numerous Wasteland Warfare factions.

Rolls2Riches is a betting and bluffing dice game. Each player will pick their favorite color dice.  Cash cards will be placed under each Dice tile until the total is over $50,000.  Each player will roll their dice and place which dice they want to play on the corresponding tile.  
Each person will take their turn around the table until everyone has played their last die.  Cash cards are given to the person with the most dice on that tile unless there is a tie.  If there is a tie, the players cancel each other out and the cash card will go to the next highest player. If there is one player on a Dice Tile they will get all cards associated with that tile.
Play continues until someone reaches a million or you run out of cards.

—description from the designer

Rioniversal: The Diamonds' World is a board game for 2 to 9 players that features fantasy characters such as gnomes and trolls. Which team are you going to choose? Each player must move, as directed by the dice, through the various worlds that make up the board. The board is organized around a central and fixed space where three trolls reside, and it includes different scenarios such as a volcanic world, a forest world, the candy country... In these worlds, six gnomes engage in mischievous activities as players navigate through this captivating adventure.

Organized into two teams, players must acquire as many diamonds as possible. To achieve this, they can use various items such as a dragon scale, magical shoes, troll mucus... By activating these items, either alone or in combination, players can gain different powers to reach their goal, unless the opposing team uses them first!

The first character to collect five diamonds leads his/her team to victory. However, careful strategic thinking is essential, as individual victories are also possible if a player accumulates the most diamonds in the game. Are you willing to sacrifice yourself for the collective triumph of your teammates?

The Diamonds' World is a game within the Rioniversal saga, where the battle for diamonds requires both young and old to make strategic decisions to secure the greatest number of these precious stones.

—description from the publisher

A small-box card game with heavy roleplay elements. Players take turns describing the actions of their character cards in order to overcome the various challenges presented to them through each scenario they face. The game ends when the last objective of the scenario has been completed.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Feministime: La Espiral del Tiempo Feminista
description:
Feministime: La Espiral del Tiempo Feminista is a board game based on the Timeline. The dynamic consists of chronologically ordering the cards to collectively create a timeline (or spiral) formed by relevant events of the feminist genealogy and, in this way, build collective memory.

Feministime is made up of a deck of 128 cards. Each card represents a historical event and includes an illustration originally created for the game by one of the 50 artists who have joined this spiral of time of their own. One side also includes the date on which the event occurred.

boardgame: Fallout: Wasteland Warfare – Robots: Assaultrons & Protectrons
description:
The ruins, bunkers and factories of the Wasteland often remain under the watchful gaze of those left behind to guard them.

Box Contents:

3 x Assaultrons
    2 x Protectrons
    5 x Scenic bases

The Protectron was designed to fill a variety of roles and may be found patrolling long forgotten shops and facilities, waiting for an emergency call out that will never come or attending on customers long rotted away. While not intended for combat they may catch the unwary off guard.

Deployed to support the US military forces, Assaultrons were left to roam after the bombs fell and can often be found still patrolling the checkpoints and convoys they were assigned to. One of the fastest and most deadly adversaries you might stumble across, their powerful melee attacks and head mounted lasers make short work of anything they perceive as a threat.

This boxed set contains five 32mm scale multi-part high quality resin Robot miniatures, each with unique scenic bases, to allow players to expand their Fallout: Wasteland Warfare games.

NOTE: This set does not contain cards. The cards may either be downloaded from Modiphius for free, or you can purchase the Raiders Wave Expansion card pack. This pack includes all the cards for Wave 2 releases (all three Raiders sets, Assaultrons & Protectrons, Wasteland Vermin (Molerats & Rad Roaches), Deathclaw, Sentry Bot, X0-1 & Armoured Dogmeat and Ghouls).

A collaborative board game to play in teams, based on the Ubuntu philosophy, which focuses on environmental education to value natural wealth and social diversity, in order to move towards more sustainable societies that address the climate emergency that haunts us, as well as social inequalities, and achieve the goals set out in the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) of the 2030 Agenda.

UBUNTU directly and indirectly addresses the 17 SDGs through its questions, as well as being part of the game cards and game board.

UBUNTU has been created with the aim of becoming an attractive and interesting tool with which to transmit basic knowledge about nature, ecology, sociology, food, technology, meteorology, environmental impacts, etc. and, above all, with which to spread the respect and love that its creators have for life on this planet and the culture of sustainability in general.

boardgame: Однажды в Чикаго Спецвыпуск 2: Кинодрама (Once upon a time in Chicago: Movie Drama)
description: Addon №2 for base game. А new case to investigate.

Take the Helm!
Raise the sails and gather your crew! In Salt of Sea pirate captains fight to build their fleet of ships and galleons to rule the seas. Players can build, steal, and dig for cards to gain advantage. Upgrade your ships to galleons for more strength and shoot cannons to sink your opponents.

On your turn you can take any two actions (even two of the same action) you can draw a card, exchange cards, build, or play cards from your hand. You need a timber, rope, and canvas card to build a ship. You can upgrade a ship to a galleon with a cannon and treasure card. Cannon cards can also be used to sink other player's ships. The first pirate captain to build their fleet to one Galleon and two Ships wins the game!

Be a pirate Captain and lead your fleet to Victory!

—description from the designer

In Rock'n'Troll each player manages a Troll band, with which they will have to challenge their opponents in a tour of 5 concerts and obtain more Fame points than their opponents! During the game you will be able to hire new musicians and instruments. But you will have to balance your performances between Technique and Scenic Presence, to obtain Fame and Coins. Furthermore, Beer, Dice and Events will make the outcome of each Concert different!

Choose side. Choose conflict. Choose strategy cards. Have fun while learning about the history of the labour movement. Choose which side to take in this struggle and learn about the experiences of the struggle named on the cards with the reference dossier included in the game.

Whether the bosses get their way or have to obey the workforce depends on your conditions and strategies. Get ready to experience a workers' conflict at home.
STRIKE!

Button Kingdoms is a bribery based deck building game, with simultaneous actions where players take on the role of child commanders of their own fantasy stuffed animal armies.

The goal of the game is to build up your kingdom of fluffy fighters by collecting currency in the form of buttons, and to seize the thrones of other players… while staying true to your character's own secret motivations.

During the Button Bazaar phase, players place bribe offers in the hopes of adding fluffy fighters to their deck, and accept the bribes of their opponents to acquire those precious buttons which become victory points at the end of the game. After this market phase is resolved, players turn their newly acquired cards against their opponents in the goal of seizing another throne to add to their dominion.

Victory will rest on three separate pillars: total BUTTONS, THRONES in your possession, and how well your deck of cards measures up to your champion’s IDEALS. Even if you fall behind in the combat aspect of the game, with skillful deck building and solid deal-making, you could still net the win.

Do you have what it takes to conquer the Button Kingdoms?

The inhabitants of this town adore pizza. The statue of the legendary pizza artisan stands proudly in the square, watching over them.
Every day, pizza makers are striving to satisfy their customers' taste buds.
In this town, a tasty pizza is a given! What matters is meeting the whimsical demands of your customers.

Although customers who order tons of toppings might contribute to your sales, beware as ingredients aren't always in stock!
But, if you look closely, even the most fickle orders seem to follow a trend. Keeping this in mind when stocking ingredients seems crucial. Watch as the whole direction of your business might even change depending on your capital investments.

Oh no! Someone's eyeing your operation.
Yes, it's those pesky rodents. They absolutely love pizza toppings. But dealing with them can be quite costly.
How will you choose to act?
Don't miss your opportunities, manage risks effectively, and aim to be the next legendary pizza shop owner!

To emerge victorious in this game, players must adeptly respond to a multitude of customer requests, accumulate profits, invest in their facilities, and accomplish secret missions. The player who garners the most victory points through these endeavors will be crowned the winner, securing their legacy as the preeminent pizza artisan in town.

Play as Marco and Polo, two explorers in search of El Dorado
Marco thinks it is quicker to reach it by sea and Polo by land. But the map becomes distorted as our disoriented adventurers progress and the familiar shores recede. To reach the end of the world, they will have to cross to the other side of the map.

Their journeys are made on twenty carefully drawn triangles, in homage to the beautiful medieval maps. This map, in which geographers will recognize an icosahedral projection, has the property of being able to be arranged in 43,380 different ways. So, while our two explorers run and sail to the antipodes, their world is recomposed like an infinite puzzle.

In Zoomino, you want to frame as many animals as possible to display them in your zoo.

To set up, take eight frames in a single color, shuffle the dominoes face down on the table, then give each player two dominoes. Each turn, each player places one domino in their play area and another face down in front of the player to their left. They then draw a domino from the table to have two in hand again.

You must place dominoes in your area horizontally and adjacent to other tiles to form at least one animal. If you create a real animal, frame it! If both backgrounds on the tile match the player color, use the solid side of the frame, which is worth 2 points; otherwise, use the multi-colored side worth 1 point.

When the draw pile is empty or someone has placed their eighth frame, the game ends. Players tally their points to see who wins, with a tie being broken in favor of the player with the most imaginary animals on a background of their color.

Golem Run is a competitive betting and race-fixing game with a trick-taking mechanic. The game is set in the dwarven society of Odrixia, the same world as Justice and Factory 42. Players represent the cheering crowds who are participating in the popular Odrixian pastime of Golem Run.

The game is played over several hands of tricks. The player who wins the trick must move the Golem(s) used to win. Players can choose not to  play any cards at all by using the "Wait and Wager" action that allows you to change your bets and not participate in the trick-taking round.

You continue playing tricks until one player runs out of cards and then proceed to score. If the Golems have not reached the finish line, deal a new hand and continue. The game ends when a Golem crosses the finish line, and then there will be final scoring. The player with the highest point total wins.

The Golems race across an obstacle strewn course, built in modular pieces by the players beforehand.

The industrial world of Bheta-Decima is collapsing, its surface ravaged by the burning debris and tainted inhabitants of the space hulk Gallowdark. In the ensuing chaos, a Magos Biologis sends an urgent distress call —and is answered by a Scout Squad of the Raven Guard, bound by a centuries-old debt to extract him and his research from a crumbling ocean-rig complex. However, a Blades of Khaine kill team has been dispatched to foil their escape —and the very fate of the Aeldari could depend on it.

Kill Team is a fast-paced skirmish game of tactical gameplay and tense missions. The new season starts with Kill Team: Salvation, which sees operatives clash in the ruins of a polluted planet. This boxed set contains two new kill teams * a Scout Squad of Space Marine Neophytes, and a Blades of Khaine kill team formed of vicious Striking Scorpions. You'll also find a Salvation Rig Apparatus terrain set to upgrade your killzone, a book packed with background information, new missions, and rules for both kill teams, plus two sets of datacards and tokens to keep your games running smoothly.

This boxed set contains:


     88-page softcover Kill Team: Salvation book: All the background, artwork, and rules you'll need for both of the two kill teams in the box, plus the story of Bheta-Decima, new missions, an infiltration campaign, and rules for the Killzone: Bheta-Decima terrain set.
     Scout Squad: Space Marines in training, who use lighter armour and wargear to undertake stealthy missions and prove their mettle. These multipart plastic miniatures include 10x Scouts, each armed with a boltgun, shotgun, or bolt pistol and knife. These models come with a variety of cosmetic and upgrade options, allowing you to build specialists such as a Tracker or Sniper.
     Striking Scorpions: Aeldari Aspect Warriors armed with chainswords and shuriken pistols, trained to hunt in shadow and kill with a sudden strike. These multipart plastic miniatures include 10x Striking Scorpions, two of which can be built as Exarchs with a variety of weapons options, as well as 2x Striking Scorpion Aspect Shrine models to use as tokens.
     Salvation Rig Apparatus: Key mechanisms that control vital functions of the extraction-rig over which both kill teams are fighting. These multipart plastic miniatures includes 5x pieces of Kill Team terrain, intended for use in the missions found in the book, alongside the Killzone: Bheta-Decima terrain set.
     Transfer Sheets: A variety of waterslide decals to easily decorate your kill teams with detailed markings and iconography. Includes 1x Aeldari Craftworld Transfer Sheet, 1x Space Marines Transfer Sheet, and 2x Raven Guard Primaris Transfer Sheets.
     Datacards: Keep games running smoothly with reference cards detailing each team's operatives, Ploys, abilities, equipment, and Tac Ops, plus reference cards for the accompanying token sheets. Includes a deck of 34x Scout Squad Kill Team cards, and a deck of 40x Blades of Khaine Kill Team cards.
     Token Sheets: Easily track abilities, objectives, equipment, and Command Points throughout your game with team-themed tokens. Includes 1x Scout Squad token sheet and 1x Blades of Khaine token sheet, each containing 44x double-sided cardboard tokens.


—description from the publisher

The great sorcerer Mórlat has run out of monsters to terrorize the world and needs your help again.

This expansion contains new cards with reversed syllables, locked syllables and symphonies with which to create new monsters.

With 3 new different game modes!

You need the base game for some game modes.

--

El gran hechicero Mórlat se ha quedado sin monstruos para aterrorizar al mundo y necesita vuestra ayuda otra vez.

Esta expansión contiene nuevas cartas con sílabas inversas, trabadas y sinfones con las que crear nuevos monstruos.

¡Con 3 nuevos modos de juego diferentes!

Necesitas el juego base para algunos modos de juego.

Do you have what it takes to become the most successful entrepreneur in the kingdom? In this roll and write game, you will build your own production chain of buildings. You will collect the raw materials and process them to half-finished goods and finished products. You will also transport your products to the city, where you can sell them to various customers, from various places such as the shipyard, the tavern, the stronghold, and the monastery. But be careful, because you will have to compete with other players which are also sending goods to the same city as you and only the first players who manage to deliver needed goods will gain the victory points for them!

Craftsmen Roll and Write is a game designed for heavy gamers who enjoy strategic and economic challenges. Each game lasts about 60 minutes, and in each round you will do various things: acquire raw resources, build and upgrade your buildings like woodworks, blacksmith, bakery, process the materials to make goods and final products from various ingredients and sending them to customers in the city. Game consist of two kind of game boards, one shared between players from where they can acquire raw material and send products to, and one private one where they manage the resources, build and upgrade their buildings, and process materials to make various products.

The game ends after a fixed number of rounds. The player with the most Victory Points wins the game. Craftsmen Roll and Write is a game of planning, optimization, and adaptation. Will you become the richest and most influential entrepreneur in the kingdom?

—description from the designer
family: Versions & Editions: Dice Versions of Non-Dice Games
Versions & Editions: Roll- or Flip-and-Write Versions of Non-Writing Games

description:
This is a fishing game using dice and cards where you compete to become the world's best angler, "King of Angler."

If the total number of dice rolled is equal to or higher than the fish level, the fishing is successful!
Catch more and more fish and earn victory points.
You can also use cards to enhance your results.

You can enjoy both the fun of using dice and being happy and disappointed with the results, and the fun of mastering cards and catching big fish!

Many of the card effects are easy to understand, and the rules are simple, making this game easy to play even for those who are new to board games.

—description from the designer

Ecosistemas, an exciting game that takes us into the fascinating kingdom of living beings, where everything is interconnected and each element is essential for survival. In this vibrant world, some act as prey, while others take on the role of predators. Do you know what each creature needs to survive? What constitutes your daily diet? Get ready to create your own food chain!

The objective of the game is clear: complete as many food chains as possible and accumulate more cards than your competitors. In Ecosystems, you will have the opportunity to explore the intricate web of life, where every choice will affect your success in creating these crucial chains. Will you be able to establish the most effective food chain and master the natural balance?

—description from the publisher (translated)

Ecosistemas, un emocionante juego que nos adentra en el fascinante reino de los seres vivos, donde todo está interconectado y cada elemento es esencial para la supervivencia. En este vibrante mundo, algunos actúan como presas, mientras que otros asumen el papel de depredadores. ¿Sabes lo que cada criatura necesita para sobrevivir? ¿Qué constituye su dieta diaria? ¡Prepárate para crear tu propia cadena alimentaria!

El objetivo del juego es claro: completa la mayor cantidad de cadenas alimentarias posible y acumula más cartas que tus competidores. En Ecosistemas, tendrás la oportunidad de explorar la intrincada red de la vida, donde cada elección afectará tu éxito en la creación de estas cadenas cruciales. ¿Serás capaz de establecer la cadena alimentaria más efectiva y dominar el equilibrio natural?

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Forbidden Jungle: Three Card Promo Pack

A set of three promos cards to add to the board game Forbidden Jungle: one spaceport and two equipment cards.

SPACEPORT:
 - Station 8 (Level 1 difficulty) / The Traverse (Level 2 difficult)

EQUIPMENT:

 - Anbaric Carapace: Protects owner from up to 3 stings from a single threat card.

description:
A competitive, narrative-driven game for 1-4 players, in which players take on the roles of the Fates guiding a lowly Waif through a dark, primitive-fantasy world of many dangers and few hopes. But the world itself is not the only threat to the Waif, for the Fates each have their own Desires - their personal, secret plans for this Truthless Self, and will do all they can to see them realised before the journey's end.

Utilising an original, unique branching-narrative system, players choose from a handful of secret objectives during setup, detailing the type of Self they wish this Waif to become by the end of the session. Telling one collective, central story, the Fates spend their Influence tokens to vote on every action the Waif takes, pushing it towards their own goals and revealing new futures for it to overcome. With over 300 entirely individual cards, no two stories will ever be the same, no matter the number of playthroughs.

—description from the designer

description:
The objective in Chameleon is to be the first player to run out of cards.

In order to remove cards from your pile you will have to match yours with those in the center of the table, either by color, background or chameleon.

—description from the publisher (translated)

El objetivo en Camaleón será ser el primer jugador en quedarse sin cartas.

Para poder quitarte cartas de tu montón tendrás que hacer coincidir las tuyas con las que hay en el centro de la mesa, ya sea por color, por fondo o por camaleón.

—description from the publisher

Originally available thru Tantrum House Season 10 Kickstarter.

During setup, replace all level 4 Sagrada Família tiles with the 4 Tiles from this promo. They work the same as the regular level 4 Sagrada Família tiles, but instead of the regular bonuses, they have certain actions depicted on them. Those actions must be resolved immediately after acquiring a Sagrada Família tile, just like the regular bonuses. In case you were to obtain one of the Promo tiles, because of someone placing Citizens on your Intersection, that player’s turn must be suspended, and you must resolve the bonus action first.

Description of all the possible bonus actions is listed below:

     Perform a regular Build a Public Service action with a discount of 1 coin. You get all the benefits from that tile in the same way as if you bought that tile using an action. Remember that you are not allowed to possess more than 1 Public Service of the same type.
     Perform a regular Tram action with a discount of 1 cloth.
     Perform a regular Take a Modernism Project action with a discount of 1 coin.
     Perform a regular Improve a Modernism Project action with a discount of 1 cloth.

This game is an experience you need to indulge in. Take a journey across America solving questions about your favorite songs!

With 9 different genres and over 100 songs, no game will be the same! From rap to jazz, country to club, there's a genre for everyone!

Start by placing your piece on start, roll the dice and move the specified amount. Depending on where you land, your genre will be chosen. Draw a card from your designated genre and the difficulty you'd like. If you answer the trivia question on the card correctly, you will be awarded points based on the difficulty. The game is over after a player crosses the board 3 times, points will then be added together and whoever has the most points wins. 5 points will be awarded to the first person to make 3 laps around the board, afterwards the game will end.

The point is as follows:
       Hard - 3
      Medium - 2
       Easy - 1
 First to do 3 Laps - 5

Game OverviewEach player commands an identical army made up of Vikings, Valkyries, Wyrms, and Ravens. Using strategy and foresight, you'll compete for area majority across the mythical Norse realms!

At the start of each round, armies are placed face down, keeping your plans hidden from your opponents. Once everyone has finished placing their units, all armies are revealed at the same time. Then, it's time for special actions—clever moves that can shift control of a realm at the last moment.

Treasures are awarded based on who has the most Vikings in a realm. But be warned: ties are harsh. If you're tied with another player, you're bumped to the back of the line—if there's any treasure left for you at all...

After three rounds, players tally their points from collected treasures and forge powerful Norse artifacts for bonus points. The player with the highest total wins the title Master of Warfare!

		
		
		
		
		
		
		
		
		

				
				
					~~~ How to Play ~~~				
				
					IntroductionAt a recent feast, the Norse Gods and Goddesses once again found themselves in a lively argument about who among them is the greatest war leader. To settle the dispute, Mimir, the wise and all-knowing advisor, presented them with a challenge. In Mimir's Challenge, you take on the role of a Norse God or Goddess, striving to gather treasures and resources to earn the highest score.

The game unfolds over three rounds, each divided into four phases.

				
				
					The Phases of Each of the 3 Rounds
         Round Set-Up: Distribute Treasure Tokens among the Realms, and refill the Artefact Cards lineup. 
         Placement Phase: Players take turns placing two Army Tokens face down in a Realm of their choice. This continues until each player has placed a set amount of Army Tokens. Once all tokens are placed, they are revealed simultaneously, allowing everyone to see their opponents’ strategies. 
         Action Phase: If any Valkyrie, Wyrm, or Raven tokens are in play, players take turns deciding which token to activate and how to use its unique ability. These abilities can influence the game by moving Army Tokens or Treasure tokens between Realms, creating dynamic shifts in the competition.
         Collection Phase: In each Realm, the player with the most Vikings gets the first pick of the Treasure Tokens. The player with the second-most Vikings chooses next, and this continues until all Treasure Tokens in the Realm are claimed. However, watch out for ties — when two or more players tie for the most Vikings, their armies are too busy squabbling to claim any treasures.
    


At the end of each round, you’ll receive an Artefact Card that serves as a blueprint for crafting one of the legendary Norse Artifacts. To craft these items, you’ll need specific materials found on Treasure Tokens. While some Treasure Tokens offer high point values, others contain the resources needed to complete your Artefact Cards, creating a strategic choice between immediate points or future bonuses.

				
				
					ScoringAt the end of the third round, points from collected Treasure Tokens are tallied, and bonus points for completed Artefact Cards are added. The player with the highest score wins Mimir's Challenge and earns the title Master of Warfare!

				
				
					~~~ About the Game ~~~				
				
					Game ModesMimir's Challenge offers two game modes to suit different skill levels:


     Less Challenging – Ideal for beginners or those who prefer a more relaxed experience.
     Normal – The standard way to play, offering balanced difficulty.


For players seeking an even greater challenge, an optional advanced rule is included to increase the difficulty beyond the normal level.

				
				
					Language DependencyThe game is designed to be language-independent. All components use symbols or icons, so as long as one player knows the rules, everyone can play together. Rulebooks are included in English, German, French, and Norwegian.

				
				
					Vision AccessibilityEach player’s Army Tokens feature both a unique color and a distinct shape, making it easier for players with color vision deficiencies to distinguish them.

Additionally, the Realm Tiles are double-sided. One side offers a more stylized, high-contrast version of the Norse Realms, improving visibility and making it easier to see the Army Tokens during gameplay.

Cocktail Poison is a game from Japan with players trying to poison other players' drinks for fun and profit.

The game has a set of cards for 6 different shaped glasses for drinking (flutes, bowls, martini and so on), and tiles in 4 colour poisons (Red, Yellow, Blue, Green) and a white antidote tile. Each player is dealt one secret empty cocktail glass (the martini glass must be one as that decides the next start player), and gets a set of the five tiles. The start player is the last person to break a glass.

Each player chooses one of their five tiles in secret and places it face-down with their empty glass card face-down on top. This makes a combination of glass style and colour which is secretly poisoned.

The rest of the glasses cards show each style of glass with each colour of drink, making up 24 cards. The four colour cards for each style of empty glass being used are selected and shuffled to make a face-down deck. Three cards are dealt up (four with 5 or 6 players).

Players then take turns drawing a face-up card, and placing it up in front of themselves until each player has drawn four cards. Then the secret combos of glass and poison are revealed and players work out their scores for the round.

If a player has a combo of poison and glass style that another player has drawn, they gain +2 pts, and the poisoned player loses -1 pt. If a player has drawn no poisoned cards, they gain +1 pt.

The white antidote tile is used during the card draw turns. If a player has chosen to hide their antidote tile, they can play it onto one of glass cards at the time they select it. This neutralises the poison, meaning if another player then had that combo, they do not score 2 pts because the poison failed. And the victim gains +1 pt for successfully using the antidote, but did not have a poison combo in play.

Players cannot score less than zero on a round, and the game continues until a player scores at least 5 points. The player with the most points is the winner.

The second edition corrects the rule that whilst a player may rarely draw more than one poisoned glass, if they successfully apply an antidote to one, they still gain +1 pt for that and do not take -1 pt for the further poisons they did not cancel.
--description by user

Part of Storyline Organized Play Pack 1.

Includes:

A set of ancient construct parts (6 heads, 5 arms, 3 back accessories, 1 shield, 1 torso, 1 legs, 1 clear base)
Complete set of cards (1 double sided spin card, 3 double sided variant cards)
1 set of punch out tokens
1 Orientation sheet with all the rules for using this character in D&D Onslaught

The year is 2461, mankind has expanded beyond Earth and colonized Venus, Mars and Titan.

For over 200 years, all communication and commerce between our four worlds has been conducted through the SysNet, a completely secure information and communication network. That is until yesterday…

Our sun erupted into activity, volatile solar storms raged across our star’s surface while massive solar flares bombard our system, causing havoc with our technologies and knocking down the security protocols of the SysNet.

With the SysNet’s defenses down,hackers and government agencies alike descend upon the vulnerable data files like Locusts, stealing everything they can before the security protocols engage and once again locks the system down.

The system is yours for the taking… Zero Day War has begun.

Zero Day War is a 2-4 player card game. Players take the roles of hackers from different planets who are taking advantage of a security malfunction in the SysNet.

Use Exploit cards to program future actions and Hack files. A unique count down mechanic is used to activate all the programs at once at the end of the round. Players steal files, complete contracts and cause havoc for other players in the game. The hacker with the most files & contracts filled wins!

—description from the publisher

Played on a modular board with tiles that look like picnic tables, each with one to two plates, and numbered 1-9+. Each player gets ten friend tokens and a goal card displaying a polyomino with either the ability to re-roll or switch a die roll. Each turn, players roll both dice to place their tokens on the 5x5 grid with a corresponding number in an attempt to reconstruct their polyomino while trying to grab the table with the most forks. The game ends when one player has all ten of their tokens on the board, then everyone tallies their forks, highest score winning.

Card Catcher is a fun, fast, family dexterity game from Level 99 Games. You can learn it in just a moment and can play quickly with both kids and adults. Only a little basic math and dexterity are required to play.


     Use your arm as a crane to drop the coin!
     Win the prize the coin lands on!
     Collect the best combination of plushies and capsules to win!


—description from the publisher

2024 Imagination Gaming Seal of Approval

Sumo Fight is a game for 1-4 players featuring 16 Sumo Wrestlers, each with their own unique 7 card deck of Sumo Action cards. The cards drive the action on the Dohyo game board where the Sumo Wrestler game Pieces interact in a contest to jettison one another from the Dohyo or to throw one another down onto the clay.

Sumo Fight offers a variety of ways to play, starting with best of 7 practice matches, while also offering the opportunity to build a sumo stable and compete against other players while adapting your wrestlers and customizing your decks using cards included in the base game! For die hard sumo fans, there is also a tournament mode, which may be played solo or with up to 4 players. Compete to claim the emperor's cup against 15 other sumo wrestlers!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Marvel Zombies: A Zombicide Game – Wong Promo Card
description: A set of Super Hero ID card + Enemy Super Hero card for Wong (Marvel Zombies – A Zombicide Game) given out at San Diego Comic Con 2023.

boardgame: The Plum Island Horror: More of a Bad Thing
description:
A new eye-witness source to the atrocities of Plum Island has come forward to tell their story and let's just say, if you thought the event seemed bad before, you're going to want to take a seat for this because that was nothing compared to the nightmares that they shared.

After countless hours of reviewing new information and consuming an unquantifiable amount of caffeinated beverages, the team that brought you The Plum Island Horror is back with a new expansion chock-full with . . . well . . . more of a bad thing.

More of a Bad Thing introduces:

     Three new playable Factions
     New Scenarios including a Nightmare Mode that significantly ratchets up the difficulty
     New Mutations, Search cards, Fate Cards, and Events
     Location manipulation and much more


—description from the publisher

As the Anti-Life virus spread all over the world, Vandal Savage gathered a group of the most ruthless mercenaries, vigilantes, and assassins, comparing them to tree lobsters for their ability to do anything they have to do to survive against insurmountable odds. The goodie-two-shoes heroes don’t stand a chance against the Anti-Life, but these villains just might have what it takes to survive this ordeal.

Unkillables is a Kickstarter Exclusive expansion, bringing a group of ruthless characters to the battle against Anti-Life. Some of them have fallen to the virus, but the rest are ready to fight back by any means necessary in order to survive the 4 new Missions included in this set. With unique new Super Heroes, Zombie Heroes, Bystanders, and Equipment cards, this expansion shows that only the good die young.

—description from the publisher
Card game to guess the Harry Potter character. It is similar to Guess Who, but only uses cards.

Gotham City has always been besieged by crime and violence. From daring criminals to the Court of Owls secret society ruling from the shadows, danger has ever lurked behind every corner. The Bat-family alone has stood against them, fighting to bring safety and justice to its citizens. But in its darkest hour, Batman and many of the Gotham Knights have fallen prey to the Anti-Life virus, joining in the carnage with the rest of the hordes. It’s up to the few surviving heroes to keep the beacon of hope lit on Gotham City’s night skies.

Gotham Knights is an expansion that brings the battle against the Anti-Life to the mean streets of Gotham City, up to the Wayne Manor, and all the way down to the Batcave. Batman, his allies, and his enemies, have been scattered between both sides of this deadly conflict. Not even an arsenal of Bat-gadgets might be enough to succeed in your missions, with a horde of unliving Talons hunting you from the shadows!

—description from the publisher

The BOP IT BB-8 game commands you to do three actions in random order. Respond as quickly as you can. If you respond correctly, you will hear another command. Keep going. If you’re not fast enough or you respond incorrectly, you’re out! (From instruction booklet)

The Green Lantern Corps, an intergalactic peacekeeping force using their willpower to wield the might of their Power Rings, should be the universe’s greatest hope in stopping the spread of the Anti-Life virus. However, even these bastions of heroism are not immune to it and must stand together against the wave of fear that threatens the galaxy.

Green Lantern Corpse is an expansion, bringing the full power (and terror) of the Green Lantern Corps. Including 4 new Missions to explore all the gameplay possibilities of wielding Power Rings in the battle against Anti-Life, whether in brightest day or in blackest night.

—description from the publisher

Catacombs: Fortress of Nazemoor is a core, standalone dungeon crawler that uses the same rules and Dexterity Game System as Catacombs Third Edition (3E). As a result this game both re-implements and expands Catacombs 3E. All Catacombs 3E expansions are compatible with Fortress.

In the Catacombs related games, players must skilfully flick wooden discs that represent one of the characters under their control. Usually this is a hero or a monster, if playing as the Dungeon Master or "Overseer". Flicking a disc represents a "shot". The basic shots are rush (for moving) and melee (for both moving and attacking). When performing a ranged shot, a separate disc is used instead of a hero or monster's disc. Ranged shots include fireballs, ice boulders, missiles and hook shots. Some shots inflict damage while others enable special effects. When all of the monsters in a room have been cleared, the heroes can advance further up the fortress.

New features: Crates (treasure chests) that contain both rewards and traps appear on runes during the Battle Phase. Assistants can be rescued that will help the heroes in their quest through the Fortress. Items may be purchased during the Battle Phase.

—description from the publisher

As the Anti-Life virus spreads across the world, the only hope for humanity may lie in the occult. Enter the Shadowpact, a group of supernatural heroes wielding mystic powers against the Anti-Living hordes. When things go from bad to worse with the appearance of the demon Trigon, hellbent on collecting the souls of both the living and unliving, it will take some kind of magic to stop him.

Shadowpact is a Kickstarter Exclusive expansion, bringing a group of supernatural characters to the battle against Anti-Life. From sorcerers to demons, these Super Heroes bring all sorts of unique magic powers to bear against the hordes over the course of 4 new Missions. But the biggest threat of all is the gigantic Trigon. Spreading deadly Hellfire across the board and collecting the souls of the fallen to empower himself, this will certainly be a hell of a challenge!

—description from the publisher

Hailing from a realm outside normal time and space, the inhabitants of New Genesis and Apokolips are so superior to human beings as to be called the New Gods. Among them, Darkseid has always been a tyrannic threat to the universe, seeking the Anti-Life Equation to dominate all of existence. In this pursuit, he inadvertently unleashed the Anti-Life Virus upon the galaxy. Succumbing to the virus himself, the undead Darkseid now leads the Anti-Life Army, followed by his zombie Parademons and Female Furies. Stopping them will take a divine intervention from the surviving New Gods.

Undead Gods is a Kickstarter Exclusive expansion that brings the cosmic power and threat of the New Gods into the Anti-Life crisis. Take the role of these superhuman entities and stand against the undead Apokoliptian onslaught over the course of 4 new Missions. As Boom Tubes start opening all over the board, the swarms of undead Parademons herald the coming of zombie Darkseid and his Female Furies. This box contains the mother of all battles!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Marvel: Crisis Protocol – Professor X & Shadow King
description:
Players will dominate the battlefield’s Astral Plane with the Professor X and Shadow King Character Pack. Both Professor X and Shadow King are mystic manipulators, with unique battlefield alteration abilities. Equipped with Team Tactic Cards that foster devious counterplay, these mental duelists are ready to boggle their opponents’ minds!

Professor X adds a long-awaited Leadership to the Uncanny X-Men Affiliation
Shadow King is a high-Threat miniature with a unique playstyle
The man for whom the X-Men are named finally joins his students on the battlefield!

Add a new touch of variety to Rangitaki with Salt and Sea, the micro-expansion for Spire's End.

Dive into 17 new cards, featuring 5 formidable new enemies and 3 enticing drink cards like The Sweet Rummy and The Burner, as well as 3 story cards that weave fresh narratives and surprises into your adventure. Enjoy exotic libations as the island breeze whispers of adventures yet to come! Includes instruction card.
