description:
Feral State Chapter 3 is the final chapter in the Feral State Saga. In this new chapter our heroes meet a companion and together they are looting the streets of a post-apocalyptic city! Will they make a good team or perish under the pressure of zombie hordes? Would you trust a newcomer, or is it better to be cautious?

If you own the first two games already, you can play with the third one with a "Campaign mode" add-on! You'll be able to experience the whole story all over, parts 1 to 3, with progression, skills and other new features!

Again your mission is to reach the final boss and eliminate him and the Zombies all over the postapocalyptic town. On your way you will fight zombies using unique battle system, which involves both luck and skill.

Feral State Ch. 3 is a PnP dice game. You roll a D6 to attack and the choose which body part you want to hit on a "pizza wheel", where you can choose the rolled number or the opposite side of the "pizza wheel" and do damage to.

When spring breaks out, the cutest little gardeners you have even seen wakes up – Bianca the bee, Fitz the fly, Sophia the butterfly, Nikki the ladybird and Sami the dragonfly.

The game contains two ways of playing.

In variant 1, you and your friends gather on the meadow to bet on and watch the little insects having a race. On your turn you will play cards to move one insect forward and watch the chain effects being triggered if it lands on a rocket token, which triggers the movement of another insect, that might trigger the movement of a third insect etc. In the end, you will receive points based on how well the insects you placed your bet on performed in the race.

In variant 2, you will play as one of the insects and take on the task of pollinating some of the flowers in the meadow. Try to remember where the species you have chosen are placed to avoid flying in vain. The first insect to have pollinated all flowers of its chosen species win the game.

—description from the publisher

One of the biggest board game stores in Sweden, Spelexperten, has selected Little Gardeners as one of six Christmas gift recommendations for children (2025), with the following reasoning:

Little Gardeners is an adorably cute 2-in-1 game that lets children step into the role of real nature heroes! 🌸🐝
In the first game, a vibrant garden race awaits, where simple but clever choices help you bet on the right insect to reach the finish line first. In the second game, you’re treated to a charming memory-style challenge where the mission is to pollinate your flowers.

The result? A game that spreads warmth, joy, and heaps of springtime vibes — no matter the season!
We completely understand why the kids fell in love with this game during testing. It’s as sweet as it is fun!

boardgame: The Lord of the Rings: The Card Game – Ered Mithrin Hero Expansion
description:
In the time since the dragon Smaug’s defeat, the city of Dale has become a prosperous trade hub. The merchants are well-equipped to conduct their business, but when a new enemy rears its head, they must join forces with heroes of Wilderland to defend their countryfolk from this terrible threat.

The Ered Mithrin Hero Expansion for The Lord of the Rings: The Card Game includes 8 heroes and contains all of the player cards and customization options originally featured in The Wilds of Rhovanion and the Ered Mithrin cycle of content. Take control of iconic heroes like Bilbo Baggins, Radagast, and Dáin Ironfoot and join forces with the merchants of Dale to protect the people of Middle-earth from those that would do them harm.

This expansion can be used to build or enhance player decks for any The Lord of the Rings: The Card Game scenario or campaign.

—description from the publisher
family: Collectible: Living Card Game (Fantasy Flight Games)
Game: The Lord of the Rings – The Card Game (LCG)

boardgame: The Lord of the Rings: The Card Game – Ered Mithrin Campaign Expansion
description:
As dark threats loom over Middle-earth, ever more people are torn from their homes and left without safety or refuge. What begins as a simple task of escorting a band of such wanderers to a new home quickly evolves into something drastically more perilous when a mighty threat emerges from the wilds of Rhovanion.

In the Ered Mithrin Campaign Expansion for The Lord of the Rings: The Card Game, one to four players explore the Wilderlands of Middle-earth in their quest to defeat a dragon that is terrorizing the countryside. Over the course of nine scenarios—which can be played standalone or as part of a larger campaign—the heroes must battle Goblins, explore the vast Wilderland, and steel themselves for a showdown with the dragon itself!

This expansion includes all of the scenarios originally featured in The Wilds of Rhovanion and the Ered Mithrin cycle, now repackaged into one box along with all-new campaign content.

—description from the publisher
family: Collectible: Living Card Game (Fantasy Flight Games)
Game: The Lord of the Rings – The Card Game (LCG)

description:
Black Spirits: Remnants is a is an expansion for the popular Black Spirits: Combat Cards game system, a supplement that replaces dice components in board games based on extremely popular dark fantasy action RPG video games that test the mettle of players' souls to use cards for their combat systems rather than dice. It expands on the philosophy of that set by introducing enhancements that add depth to your board game, with a goal focused on maximum value per dollar. It provides the same type of gameplay depth and similar design goals as Black Spirits: Wayward and Weathered, the sprawling expansion to Combat Cards, but in a package half the size. The two sets can be played separately, but they also intertwine, so having both expansions becomes greater than the sum of each.

As with the Black Spirits: Combat Cards core set, Black Spirits: Wayward and Weathered is drop-in with no modifications, house rules, or tweaks necessary to the board game played. It's built with the latest sets of those board games in mind, but is also compatible with earlier versions of those games, so you can inject new life (or of course, death) into your already-owned games regardless of what your collection looks like.

Set in the 20 May 1941 airborne invasion of Crete. This fast playing game features variable forces for each side, drift calculation for the Fallschirmjäger's air drop, and communication problems on the Allied side.  The game has a small footprint and low counter density - you'll want to play several times to experience the different paths to victory.

Those that had brought about the fall of Robespierre in Thermidor were dubbed 'The Thermidorians'. All agreed that the so-called 'Terror' had to be winded down but this in turn prompted the Royalists and Sans-culottes from re-emerging out of the the shadows. The Thermidorians want to ensure the survival of the Republic but they do not want to restore the monarchy, nor are they willing to preserve popular democracy. The Thermidorian faction starts this expansion with a slight advantage, but it is going to have to walk the sharp line in between the 'right' (Conservatives) and the 'left' (Radicals) in order to emerge victorious...otherwise, the 'Dry guillotine' awaits!

This first expansion is played with the 1793:Patriots & Traitors base game.

—description from the publisher

Revamp is a competitive dice allocating game for 2 to 4 players. The players are owners of a mansion. They want to make it into a haunted mansion and therefore must revamp the place. The cards that are placed on the player board, form the haunted mansion.

Goal of the Game
The players need to create the most successful haunted mansion. This is a haunted mansion that creates as much fear as possible amongst the visitors. To achieve this, the owners are hunting for the most scary props, creatures and interior to satisfy (read: scare) their visitors.

End of the game
The game ends when a player has all the 9 attraction spots covered in their haunted mansion. The player who collected the most fear points at the end of the end scoring, wins the game. 
This dice allocating game is interactive and fun!

—description from the publisher

A game about dominating the Copenhagen crime scene.
Monopoly-style, you move around on the board, buying areas. If you land on someone else's area, you pay rent to them.

In the game, you play as either Rockerne, Nørrebro, Politiet, or Christiania. If you go bankrupt by not being able to pay another player, you lose the game, but you are not out. Instead you will be working for the other player.
The game ends when two players have lost. If they have been taken over by the same player, that player wins. Otherwise, the two remaining players compare money and the richest wins.

Culture Clash is an expansion to the base game of Cosmos: Empires. It adds a second build pool and two new mechanics: Culture Cards and the Patrol ability. Cosmos: Empires is a 2-8 player, 15-45 minute engine building card game. Jump into the galaxy, choose your strategy and build your galactic empire. Race against your friends, exploiting their economy to your advantage!

The game is played with two decks, from which 6 cards each are drawn into the “pool” players can select and build cards from. Each card has a cost, roll value and production value. Players also get 5 "Culture Cards" and pick 2 to keep. They can be revealed any time during the game to activate their effects. These are a-symetrical effects which are passive abilities or one-time uses.

Each turn, the current player gets 2 actions and then rolls 2 D4 (4 sided dice). The current player can use one of their actions to increase or decrease the total of the two dice by one. Then, each player with a card with a Roll value equal to the new total gets Credits equal to the same cards production value.

Finally, the current player can use their remaining actions to build a card from the card pool (or “cycle” it and take 2 credits).

—description from the publisher

18 Parceks is a trick-taking space race, where the tricks give you resources instead of points. After trick phase you use those resources to move your space ship on a modular space track bulit with cards. Players may also attack other players and make pit stops on space stations, where they can buy upgrade cards to their ships. These upgrades include better weapons, engines, shields etc.

This expansion for SAS Rogue Regiment introduces new rules, a new mission and an all-new event deck to your game of Stealth And Shooting. Take out all new enemies including attack dogs, flamethrowers and a fuel truck. You’ll even get the chance to blow up a ‘Seehund’ submarine - BOOM!

Dropped into the frozen wilderness, you are given a mere month to acquire both the supplies and the skills to propel a rag-tag group of dogs into a dependable team capable of enduring the most challenging terrain and weather conditions imaginable.

With the dogs and your own iron will as your sole companions, you must use everything at your disposal to navigate the trail to victory. The reward of advancing however, must always be balanced with the weather, the terrain and the health of the dogs.

When darkness approaches, do you set up camp to regain your strength or do you press the advantage and risk injury? When the winds roar and the snow blinds your path, do you hunker down or blindly inch your way forward to where the next checkpoint ought to be?

In K9 Quest, calculated foresight is critical to avoiding defeat. Blind ambition however, is needed for ultimate victory.

—description from the publisher

Two players are alpinists competing to reach the top of the mountain. Every player has five pegs (climbers) of their colour connected by a string (rope). On their turn, a player can move one peg and place it in a hole on their side of the mountain, but the reach is limited by the string and other pegs. Players can also push each other out.

Whoever is the first to reach the top of the mountain, becomes the winner.

How well do they know you? How well do you know others?

Get to know your friends or family deeply by seeing what they would do in unpredictable, strange, interesting or funny situations.

Dilema is a game of deduction. The winner is the one who correctly predicts what the other players' answers to dilemmas, opinions and confessions are.

A board game of fun while you deepen the connection of your relationships and train your emotional intelligence.
Card set for three additional categories for Personal Preference: Concepts + Ideas, Art + Photography, and Quotes + Sayings.

Become the King of all Dragons!

In Draconian Blood Honor, players take on the role of dragons from different clans, each with its own unique abilities. Battle your opponents in epic clashes, using your powers to defeat them. The last dragon standing will be crowned the King of all Dragons!

—description from the publisher

This pack of promo cards was published for Ludifest in Santiago on the 15th and 16th of April, 2023.

It contains 16 item cards, contributed by 16 people from the Chilean games industry (designers, publishers and influencers):

Jimena Aros
Maureen Berho
Gloria Cárdenas
Naty Casten
La Profe Lu Estrella
Ketty Galleguillos
Estefi Leiva
Mapa
Laura Mena
Joselyne Millán
Miila Parra
Margarita Pino
Adriana Rubio
Mafe Santander
Daniela Valentini
Ximena Vilches

Due to an error, the cards were printed in the the wrong format (too large). They cannot easily be shuffled into the deck, but can be placed within the card matrix.

You, the Emperor's greatest heroes, must stop the Ogre horde. Only the most courageous dare face these mighty agents of destruction who revel in violence and leave a trail of devastation in their wake.

Seek out their subterranean fortress and battle your way through tunnels. There, in the very heart of the mountains, you will find the hall of the Ogre Lord. Destroy him and you will break the power of the Ogre Horde. But beware the Ogres have devised many deadly new traps to crush you and are aided by the foul powers of Chaos sorcery. You will need all the courage and fighting skills that you command to defeat these awesome creatures.

So prepare for battle against the Ogre Horde.

—description from the publisher

This is a 2-4 player competitive strategy tile game.  The object of the game is to get rid of your pieces first.  The board consists of 13-sided Einstein shapes.  On a turn, a player can play one piece.  If playing the piece forms a hexagon, the player can move again.

The game board is a continuous einstein shape map of 13-sided shapes (Tridecagons).  The pieces have two different colors and each player has a unique combination of two colors.  It's easier to connect with other players' pieces to form hexagons, so one cannot simply build off of their own piece.

The game rules are very simple.  The challenge of this game is grasping shape geometries, and getting a spatial recognition of how the shape work and connect.  This can take some getting use to.  The game really challenges ones' ability to visualize geometry.

—description from the designer

Tap your Intuition, Make your guess, and Place your bet. Enjoy the Rewards. Its like roulette, memory and poker had a baby!  35-45 min per game.  Ages 9+ and 2 or more players.

Players take turns guessing which card will be revealed from a deck of 19 specialty cards. Excitement builds as players place wagers on various outcomes on a large colorful gameboard.

Through a blend of chance and skill, players who make correct guesses and wagers are greatly rewarded and the player with the most tokens at the end of the game wins!

—description from the designer

boardgame: Sunrise at the Studio: Potter Specialties Mini-Expansion
description:
The Potter Specialties Mini-Expansion adds private scoring goals drawn during setup and revealed over the course of play.

Draft private scoring goals during setup, then reveal 2 of 3 cards during the course of play. Find new ways to score that may shape more of your decisions as you work on your pottery projects!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Snowfall Over Mountains: Another Winter's Day Mini-Expansion
description:
Another Winter's Day Mini-Expansion adds new scoring cards and a tool card with a corresponding 1x1 tile.

Find more challenges when it comes to arranging the tiles around your cabin, and discover some of the strategies to use the Animal Guide tool card at the right moment!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Path of Civilization: Reunion Tower Promo Card
description:
A level 2 wonder: Immediately gain two population and two sages to the yellow tray.

Card number GW-44

Welcome to Football: Five-a-side!

Get ready to experience the thrill of football in this fast-paced board game that captures the essence of the beautiful game in just 20 to 50 minutes. With six iconic teams—Barcelona, Madrid, Paris, Manchester, London, and Munich—compete head-to-head in intense, strategic matches.

Inside the box, you'll find everything you need to dive into the action-packed world of football. Unleash your team's potential with 12 player cards for each side, carefully crafted to feature 1 goalkeepers, 4 defenders, 3 midfielders, and 4 attackers. Customize your team's strengths with 10 training tokens—5 for attacking prowess and 5 for defensive mastery—to give your players the edge they need to dominate the pitch.

The game includes three dynamic football pitches that set the stage for thrilling showdowns. Roll the dice to determine the outcomes and make strategic decisions that will lead your team to victory.

With 72 player cards, 6 team boards, 72 player tokens, 6 penalty arrows, 30 training tokens, Football: Five-a-side offers endless possibilities for tactical gameplay, ensuring every match is unique and exciting. Take charge of your favorite team, devise winning strategies, and outmaneuver your opponents to claim footballing glory!

But wait, there's more to this box than meets the eye! Unfold it to reveal the grand stage for the ultimate showdown—the football stadium for the final match between the best players. The box transforms into a vibrant and immersive stadium setting, complete with detailed graphics and design elements that bring the excitement of the final moments to life.

Gather your elite players, set the stage, and experience the pulse-pounding thrill of the final match right at your fingertips. This innovative feature elevates your gaming experience, turning the box into the heart of the action, where champions are made and unforgettable moments unfold. Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of a thrilling football final, creating memories that will last well beyond the last whistle.

Whether you're a seasoned strategist or a rookie, Football: Five-a-side promises excitement, competition, and the joy of the game. Get ready to lace up your boots and experience football in a whole new way!

—description from the publisher
family: Sports Teams: Manchester United Football Club

description:
Cyber Crash is a card game for 2-6 players, where friends play against each other as hackers. Players take turns drawing cards from the Main Deck, and execute computer instructions.

There are 4 Crash Cards hidden in the Main Deck. If you draw a Crash card it's game over unless you can play a Debug Card or Lucky Break.

Mess up your friends by stealing their cards with Pull Request, or manipulating the deck with Out of Order Execution. Switch turns on them so they draw the wrong card.

Also, each player is trying to manipulate a shared number called the Accumulator to match a Target Number. Both numbers are represented with d10 (10-sided) dice. You use Operation Cards such as Add, Multiply, Divide and Subtract, along with Data (number) cards to change the Accumulator. To win, manipulate the Accumulator to equal the Target Number, or be the last hacker standing!

—description from the designer

boardgame: Murder Mystery Mini: CANARY tells no tales
description:
A hard-boiled mystery set in Yokohama.
The woman who fell to her death from Hotel Nyao (Toriso) overlooking Yokohama Port was “Canary,” an undercover operative of the CIA who had been assigned to the terrorist organization ! Why did she die?
What is the connection with the terrorist plan that is being planned for the first time in 12 years? In order to pursue the ‘truth behind Canary’s death’ and prevent terrorism, two CIA operatives and two public security police officers begin an investigation.

“Mother Mystery” where each player takes charge of each character in the story and aims to “unravel the truth.” Please enjoy the story created by the detailed worldview and hard-boiled drama.

boardgame: ムーンストーン邸殺人事件  (Murder mystery Mini: the Moonstone Murder Case)
description:
A guessing contest between four detectives! How will the real mystery end?
The setting is a mansion in the American South in the mid-20th century. One night, four detectives came from England, invited by Sir Moonstone, who loved mysteries.
However, shortly after the banquet, the owner of the mansion, Lord Moonstone, is found dead. Was his death a suicide or killing someone else? If it is the latter, who is the culprit? The detective competition begins now!

Please tag along with “White Raven, Red Die” and enjoy the full-scale mystery by Kyun Yasuda and Megumi Landscape.

Chinchillas are native to South America. These furry animals inhabited dry rocky areas up to 5,000 meters above sea level. The natural color of the chinchilla is gray (standard). But when chinchillas were brought to Europe at the beginning of the 20th century, people began to breed them, creating new colors of these cute rodents.

Which of you will create the most successful chinchilla nursery and be the first to receive rare colors such as black velvet, violet, and white-rose? In the family economic board game "Chinchilla Nursery" you will learn not only how to breed pets, but also how to properly maintain and care for them.

—description from the publisher

Shot&Spin! is a Print & Play golf game designed for solo or group players, bringing the challenge and strategy of golf right to a printed sheet.
Utilizing a unique combination of simple physical components such as a pencil, a stopwatch, a ruler and a paperclip players navigate through various game maps representing golf holes, each with its unique challenges including fairways, roughs, bunkers, ponds, and trees.

The aim of the game is to complete each hole with the fewest strokes possible, maximizing your score. Players choose from different types of clubs (Woods, Irons, Wedges, and the Putter), each with specific distances and shot times. Accuracy is key: players must estimate the distance by eye and mentally calculate the time to "hit" the ball towards the target. However, if the shot isn't precise enough, the "Spin" factor comes into play: spinning the paperclip on a table determines the unexpected outcome of the shot, adding an element of randomness and fun.

Shot&Spin! boasts a great replayability, ensuring that no two games are ever the same. This dynamic quality stems from the game's diverse course maps, each presenting unique obstacles and strategic decisions. Players are constantly faced with different challenges, requiring adaptation and tactical thinking with every round.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Firefly Adventures: Brigands and Browncoats – Dockside Unrest
description:
Sometimes the best way in is to get all the guards out. Your employer wants you to cover your tracks with an old-fashioned riot. The theft should be ascribed to the general chaos you’ve left in your wake. Leave behind just enough chaos to cover your tracks, but don’t pile up the bodies.

—description from the publisher

Does your partner's snoring keep you awake at night? Or do you feel stressed? Take a load off and let your friends solve all the little things you thought were problems!

Share any small or big issue, let your friends come up with the most imaginative solutions to help you, and pick your favourite one! You and the person who provided the best answer to your problem both get to move ahead.

Шалені шкарпетки ("Crazy Socks") - a crazy evening is guaranteed!

Brief rules:

     Divide into 2 teams (1+ players each) and place your chips on the "Start" field. Each team takes its own sock.
    
     Each team chooses a player for the first turn. This player spins the arrow to select the item to be pulled from the sock.
     Both players start the search at the same time. You can't put your hand in a sock beforehand.
     The player who first draws the desired item gets one point.
     After each round, return the objects back to the sock.
     At the end of the round, pass the sock to another team member - now it's his turn to spin the arrow.
     The first team to score 9 points wins!


—description from the publisher

Kickstarter Edition of Titans which contains four expansions (Spirit of War, Titans Power, King's Emissaries, and Banners of Glory) and also plastic miniature as the first player token.

Banners of Glory expansion is a part of the deluxe edition of the game and is not available in retail.
family: Versions & Editions: Big Box Versions of Individual Games

description:
bRainbow is a fun game based on the Stroop effect of human psychology.

It is about a delayed reaction when reading the names of colors when the color of the text does not match the meaning of the word (for example, the word "red" is written in blue). There are rumors that, thanks to this trick, the CIA exposed Soviet spies! The game trains reaction and memory, and also teaches you to concentrate on several things at the same time.

Basic rules:

Each player receives 6 different colored cards. In the center of the table is the main deck, from which the task card is opened:

     If the word "color" is on the card - each player searches among his cards for those that correspond to the color of the letters
     If the word "name" is on the card - each player searches among his cards for those that correspond to the name of the color
     If the name of the color is written in black letters - each player looks for cards with a similar background color
     If a "bRainbow" card has fallen out - you need to quickly cover it with your palm


Whoever fulfills the necessary condition first takes the card. The winner is determined by the number of received cards. There are also additional rules to increase complexity.

Complete orders for brewing beer and making certain combinations of these orders, which will bring you bonuses.

But on your difficult journey as a brewer, you will also meet no less skilled, and sometimes insidious competitors who will do everything to be ahead of you in this business. Are you ready to prove to everyone that you are the best brewer in town? So let's start a real Battle of the Brewers!

Each player's turn consists of several sequential actions:


     Draw cards. The player takes two material cards and two product cards into his hand.
     Combination. The player combines raw material and products cards to complete the task.
     Draw event cards. The player takes an event card from the deck.
     Hand check. If there are more than five cards in the hand, the player discards the extra ones, but order and event cards do not count towards the limit.


In addition, you can play event cards at any time during your turn.

The game ends when one player manages to complete five orders, and the winner is determined by the number of victory points.

The game that will "Have you at Hello!"

"Nobody puts baby in a corner" in this game all about your favorite movies: Romantic comedies!

Compete in teams to identify the perfect pairs, romantic one-liners and silver screen hits from your favorite gals' or date night films.

Will you say anything to earn a heart? Be the first team to earn two red foil hearts from each of the three categories to win!

—description from the publisher
This pack contains 7 new achievements for Cartouche! Shuffle these new cards into the achievement deck during setup.

Juego electrónico de habilidad y rapidez. Mueve los discos de la montaña durante tu turno para que tus bolitas (gemas) bajen y lleguen a tu bote salvavidas. Ten cuidado con los caminos sin salida y evita que tus oponentes se lleven sus gemas antes.
Gana quien tenga más gemas de su color.

Electronic game of skill and speed. Move the discs on the mountain during your turn so that your balls (gems) go down and reach your lifeboat. Be careful with dead ends and prevent your opponents from taking their gems first.
Whoever has the most gems of their color wins.

A Monopoly style game focused around the Danish city Herning. Buy and own local places, complete goals as your persona describes and rule Herning. Either make the other players go bankrupt or complete 3 of your goals to win the game.

Midtjyllands hovedstad har fået sit eget brætspil! Land på felter som MCH Arena, Boxen og Hingstekåring.
Brætspillet er familievenligt, og kan spilles af 2-6 personer i alle aldre. Spillet hylder og tager kærligt pis på hverdagen i Herning og tager i gennemsnit 1-2 timer at spille.
The classic junior version of Monopoly but featuring Bluey and her family.  Play all over town with Bluey and her family!  Collect dollarbucks and win!  Includes Mum, Dad, Bingo, and Bluey tokens!

Instant Space, Infinite Possibilities!

Gather your crew and prepare to explore the vast reaches of infinite space! Your newly installed rocket drive will aid in mining valuable resources from nearby asteroids, while your experimental drop drive will let you jump to distant and unknown depths of space. Orbit strange worlds to sell your cargo, pick up passengers, and collect alien specimens, all while battling unscrupulous pirates hell-bent on profiting off your tireless efforts - it's time to drop into infinite space!

Drop Drive is a lightweight sandbox game for featuring a "drop-style" mechanic that assures no two games could possibly be the same. Drop Drive blends strategy with a novel spatial element that will challenge casual and hardcore gamers alike!

THE BIG BANG! At the start of each game, objects of all kinds are dropped onto the table from a height of 4 to 5 inches. This creates a galaxy layout with infinite possibilities. You will then assume the role of an alien starship captain, exploring space, upgrading your ship, mining asteroids for precious resources, and landing on mysterious worlds to sell your cargo, pick up passengers, and collect strange alien specimens!

—description from the publisher

This expansion pack is made up of 6 very popular genres for the childhood and adolescence of the generation of the 80's and 90's. Friendship Movies, with groups of friends going on adventures, superheroes were already popular in the 80s thanks to Tim Burton's Batman and Christopher Reeves' Superman. Time travel had as a reference one of the best movies in pop culture: Back to the Future, fantasy made our imagination fly and animated movies were our favorites when we were little.

Genres included:

Friendship (Hey you guys!)
Anime (My codename is Project 2501)
Cartoons (Hakuna Matata!)
Fantasy (You must live your story)
Superheroes (Where will he get those wonderful toys from?)
Time Travel (Where we go we don't need wheels)

—description from the designer

Este pack de expansion se compone de 6 géneros muy populares para la infancia y adolescencia de la generacion de los 80's y 90's. Peliculas de Amistad, con grupos de amigos viviendo aventuras, los superheroes ya eran populares en los 80 gracias al Batmand e Tim Burton y el Superman de Christopher Reeves, Los viajes en el tiempo tuvieron como referente una de las mejores peliculas de la cultura pop: Regreso al Futuro, la fantasia hizo volar nuestra imaginacion y las peliculas de animacion eran nuestras favoritas cuando eramos peques.

Generos incluidos:

Amistad (Hey chicos!)
Anime (Mi nombre clave es Proyecto 2501)
Dibujos Animados (¡Hakuna Matata!)
Fantasia (Debes vivir tu historia)
Superheroes (¿De donde sacará esos juguetitos?)
Viajes en el Tiempo (Allí a donde vamos no necesitamos ruedas)

—description from the designer (Spanish)

Doom Tin Crawler is a solo, card based crawler with dice where a heroic space marine embarks on a mission to collect precious sun shards scattered throughout the galaxy.

Along the way, they encounter hostile alien species and engage in intense battles to protect their mission. As they journey deeper into the unknown, they stumble upon barren tombs and spacecrafts, uncovering ancient secrets and technologies that could change the course of their mission. They must overcome the challenges that lie ahead and complete their quest before time runs out.

Set up your mission cards and complete the objectives needed! Flip over the top card of the Doom deck to get started. What will you encounter? When you explore, draw one card at a time. Flip the card face up and set it next to the deck. Read the text to see what kind of encounter the card represents. Combat with aliens, cosmic events, and hazardous locations are just some of the chaos you will endure.

Can you survive all 8 missions to save the planet from DOOM!?!

boardgame: Evacuation: P3 – Italian Edition Promo Card
description:
An Action Card, available in the Italian Edition

Action :

     Spend one resource to research a Technology

In マイタウン (My-town), players bring life back to your hometown and make it a new bustling lively place for people to enjoy!

The hometown you once knew which used to bustle with activity is not what it used to be.  The public facilities closed down and the shopping district has became deserted. You and your fellow competitor businessfolk have decided to try revitalize your hometown and proudly call it My Town again.

My-town is a town building area control game.  Players roll dice and move around the board to purchase stores and facilities,  develop the residential areas, and attract more people to increase the liveliness of the town, to restore it to glory.

The Town is divided into 4 areas, try to gain control of the areas by placing more people, houses and upgrades. Once you have successfully developed a house in each of the 4 areas, build your landmark in one of the areas! Declare that area as "My Town", and race around the board. As soon as you reach "My Town", the area with your landmark you win!


「陣取りゲーム」と「すごろく」を掛け合わせた、新感覚の街づくりゲームです。街に見立てたゲームボード上を周回しながら物件を購入し、増やした資産で人を呼び込み、家を建設して住宅街を開発します。4カ所のタウンで人や家のトークンを置いたり、動かしたりしながら他プレイヤーよりも多くの賑わいをつくり、自分のランドマークを建てたマイタウンに到達できれば勝利します。

--description by publisher
designers: Tsuyoshi Hashiguchi (はしぐち つよし)
publishers: GALLERY OUCHI (ギャラリーおうち)

description: A fast pace, simultaneous play card game.  Be the first to get rid of your cards, but mind the switch!  Rules change as you play, time the switch to your favor!

boardgame: Calabozo: El Escape – La Aventura Continua
description:
Mexican dungeon crawler game in spanish, based on 70´s Dungeon! board game.

Juego mexicano de mazmorreo, basado en el juego Dungeon! de los 70´s.

boardgame: A Strange Occurrence at Crown House
description:
One moment, you are chasing a hot lead on a case. The next, you find yourself inexplicably trapped inside Crown House. It's a strange place that is boarded up from the outside and filled with things from your past. You have the familiar feeling that you have been to Crown House before, but that's about as far as you get with your memories of the place. At first, everything just seems weird and confusing. Then, you find a find a note addressed to you written by someone calling themselves 'the owner' and you begin to panic. The owner tells you that you are trapped inside Crown House indefinitely and that lives are at stake if you don't find a way to escape. You immediately think of your family and frantically begin to try and understand what you need to do to escape the confines of this weird, old mansion. Whoever is holding you hostage inside this place is definitely making it personal. How does any of this connect to the case you were investigating? Will you unravel the threads of this story and come to know the details of A Strange Occurrence at Crown House?

As with all Deadbolt Mystery Society games, you step into the role of the detective. Examining the evidence provided, visiting different locations and using the password protected QR mechanic to uncover the truth.

Players win once they catch the killer, find whats missing or whatever else is needed to solve the case at hand.

As a detective, you rarely get a chance to relax and watch TV. When you do, you avoid crime procedurals at all costs and focus more on lighthearted programs like “The Ultimate Game Show,” which happens to be your favorite. When you receive an invitation to be a contestant on the program, you jump on the opportunity without question. Little do you know at the time, the reason you are brought on to compete is because the host, Rob Rogers, thinks someone is out to kill him. Will you choose what's behind Door #3, spin the wheel, or phone a friend to help solve this mystery? Will you make it to the Grand Prize round and unmask a killer? Come on down, play The Game Show Murders, and, perhaps, even buy a vowel...because the only thing missing from M_RDER is U!

As with all Deadbolt Mystery Society games, you step into the role of the detective. Examining the evidence provided, visiting different locations and using the password protected QR mechanic to uncover the truth.

Players win once they catch the killer, find whats missing or whatever else is needed to solve the case at hand.

When you boarded the train a few days ago, you didn’t know what to expect. This was your first time on a luxury train ride, after all. The ride to your destination is scheduled to take five days, but, thus far, the opulent accommodations have made the travel more of an extravagance than a chore. On the morning of day four, however, you are awakened by a commotion in the hallway. Opening your door of your cabin, you hear the words every good detective story begins with: "There's been a murder." The victim is an anonymous gentleman who has no identification and no ticket. Who is he? How did he get on board? Why was he murdered? Will the murderer strike again? Those are the questions you must answer as you attempt to solve the mystery of The Unknown Passenger.

As with all Deadbolt Mystery Society games, you step into the role of the detective. Examining the evidence provided, visiting different locations and using the password protected QR mechanic to uncover the truth.

Players win once they catch the killer, find whats missing or whatever else is needed to solve the case at hand.

Throughout your career as a detective, you’ve had a variety of odd things sent to you through the mail: ransom notes, encoded threats, kidnapping photos, etc. But, you’ve never had anyone send you a pawn ticket until today. Even stranger is the fact that all of the information on the pawn ticket- including name, address, and phone number-is yours. Curious as to who sent the ticket and why something was pawned in your name, you visit the pawn shop, trade in the pawn ticket, and wait anxiously while the clerk rummages around to find the item. Eventually, he returns with a puzzle box and tells you that the amount borrowed against the value of the box is a single dollar. You pay the dollar eagerly and begin trying to open the box to see what’s inside. As you quickly find out, there is more to this puzzle than meets the eye. A lot more. Can you solve a mystery within a mystery? Locate The Missing Piece and find out.

As with all Deadbolt Mystery Society games, you step into the role of the detective. Examining the evidence provided, visiting different locations and using the password protected QR mechanic to uncover the truth.

Players win once they catch the killer, find whats missing or whatever else is needed to solve the case at hand.

boardgame: Вулканы Камчатки: Рискни покорить! (Volcanoes of Kamchatka: Dare to Conquer!)
description:
Welcome to Kamchatka - a land of incredible nature, ancient volcanoes, and indescribable views! The region is specially popular among travelers, ready to accept the challenge and climb numerous summits.
Collect resources, prepare your equipment, and gain experience to conquer the highest summits on Kamchatka! Set out for a journey but be careful because the weather can change drastically and your climb can turn into a dangerous adventure!

Pillage the Village is a 2-6 player game in which each player takes on the role of a dragon competing to build the largest hoard of gold and not get slain by the knight at game's end. Using a phase system, players act simultaneously rather than taking turns, adding chaos to the feel of play. Each player can generally perform one of three actions each round:


     Pillage the village, which guarantees more gold but increases the likelihood of villagers killing your increasingly threatening self.
     Steal from another dragon, which gives you a chance at taking gold from another player with the risk of raising threat.
     Protect your lair, which prevents other dragons from stealing from you and lowers your threat level as the villagers didn't see you flying about.


All gold earnings are based on die rolls, and treasure cards can have rule-altering effects.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description:
At the start of the game, each player pays a token into the till and receives a figure. The game is played with 2 dice; You advance the figure in the clockwise direction by the number rolled on both dice. Every time a player gets past the number 13, he has to pay a token into the till for the new round. Whoever gets exactly the number 13 first wins and receives the contents of the till.

The game was published in postcard size for soldiers to play in the trenches.

—user summary

Bomb 'Em is an Australian war time target game where players aim at a two-sided target board with one side displaying ground-based targets such as tanks, airfield, troops, railway bridges and Berlin and the other side showing maritime targets such as destroyers, troopships, aircraft carrier, cruiser and battleships.

Bomb shape darts are used to play in 3 different ways:


     Dropped directly from above with the target on the floor
     Aimed and darts thrown similar to a conventional dart game with the target board on a wall
     Lobbed from a short distance with the target board on the floor


Where the bomb darts land determines a score and the highest score after a certain number of throws is the winner.

—user summary

boardgame: Dungeon Drop: Dark Jelly Promo Card
description:
A kickstarter exclusive promo from the 'crossover pack' that was given to backers of the Drop Drive kickstarter campaign.

X=4, plus 2 for each pillar within 1 card lenght

Unexplained Force:
Move the closest 2 pillars 1 card lenght toward the dark jelly.
If any pillars are touching the Dark Jelly. Re-drop them outside the Dungeon Boundary.

Scoring: Score 6

In this visual speed game you will have to take your concentration to the limit. The players set around the board whit a note pad handy. The younger will be the thrower on the first play. Then it will rotates the thrower on each play. The person on the right of the thrower will start the timer. When the shooting voice sound, the thrower throw a random amount of tokens on the board.
The goal is to count the tokens in a limited amount of time. When the time ends, an alarm sounds and the thrower have to lift one of board edges to erase the throw.
The players take note of the amount of tokens they think there are (whether they have counted or estimated them) on the first
column of the note pad. Then the thrower counts the actual amount of tokens there were on the board. That number is written down on the second column. And on the third column they have to write down the absolute difference between the first two columns.
A game consist of 5 plays. At the end, each player will sum all the difference on their own note pad. The winner is the one whose sum is the smallest.

En este juego de rapidez visual deberás llevar tu concentración al máximo. Los jugadores se disponen alrededor del bastidor con un anotador en mano . El más joven de la mesa será el lanzador en la primera jugada. Luego rotará el lanzador en cada jugada. La persona a su derecha será la encargada de iniciar el temporizador de la app. Al oír la voz 
de tiro, el lanzador tira una cantidad de fichas aleatorias al bastidor.
El objetivo es contar las fichas que hay sobre el bastidor en un tiempo limitado. Cuando se termina el tiempo disponible para contar sonará una chicharra y el lanzador elevará uno de los extremos del bastidor para borrar la jugada.
Los jugadores deben anotar la cantidad de fichas que creen que hay en juego (ya sea porque las contaron o por estimación) en 
la primer columna del anotador. Luego se cuentan cuántas fichas hay sobre el bastidor. Ese numero se anota en la segunda columna, y por ultimo, en la tercera se anota la diferencia absoluta entre las dos primeras columnas.
Una partida consta de 5 jugadas. Al finalizar se deben sumar todas las diferencias de cada jugada. El ganador es quien tenga la menor suma.

Garlandland is a game where players arrange their own deck of seven different cards, each showing half of a garland made up of three rings of different symbols. When the cards are placed next to each other, only one of the halves of the ring connects to form a full garland. Arrange your cards, to construct poker-like melds and create the most the best set of garlands that you can make!

—description from the designer

A similar set of cards to the Funnies set.

Sillies is named after the comic strips presented in newspapers during the first half of the 20th century, Sillies is a set of Legendary Units inspired by the lighter side of life, including comic book characters, movies and boardgames culture.

Each of these 12 Legendary Units offers a unique RWB table that replaces the standard one and a set of 5 strongly-themed legendary cards. Additionally the set includes 4 War Stories.

These will help players beat the Bunker with a smile.

—description from the publisher

Have you ever dreamed of exploring new planets, discovering new species and studying alien civilization? Do you have what it takes to lead a team of scientists and specialists on a daring space mission? If so, play Beyond the Horizon! It's a sci-fi strategic Roll and Write, Print and Play board game for 1-4 players with lots of interaction between them.

In Beyond the Horizon, you are the space mission commander on a spaceship orbiting at the mysterious planet Zay Delia. As soon as the most powerful corporations found out about this planet, they sent their missions towards it to explore and investigate. You are the leader of one of them, your goal is to send your science crew members to the surface, research and collect four key types of samples: flora, fauna, planetary geology and remnants of alien civilization. Equip your crew with the right tools, from mission suits to space vehicles, manage your resources and time wisely. Develop your technology for it to help you in your future moves. You must plan your way ahead from the first turn and prove to be a great tactician - respond fast and accurately to the actions of competitors.

Beyond the Horizon uses many modern board game mechanics like territory control, worker placement and building technology tree. Play most efficiently, as you are competing with space missions from other corporations. Game consists of two game sheets - a planet sheet which all players share and a spaceship sheet where each player will manage their crew, technology and gained assets.

Become Mission Commander today and embark on an epic space journey for the unknown!

—description from the publisher

Roll the dice and press the bell before everyone else. Now, say the correct word to win, but be careful! Not just any word will work, but it will have to be related to the category indicated by the die and must begin with the letter found in the area indicated by the colored die. Demonstrate your knowledge and mental speed in this entertaining game.

Rolling in Wonderland Is a competitive Board Game created for your entire family with a seamless and easy-to-teach-and-play flow. Play as children that, just like Alice, stumbled into Wonderland and met all the famous characters we all love from Lewis Carroll.

On your turn, you will use actions to acquire more victory points than other players, discover cards, make friends, and use your mushrooms to execute powerful combos in a highly strategic action selection/dice drafting system never seem before. There are almost infinite possibilities and interactions during gameplay that every game feels different! There will be a lot of decisions at every turn, each with direct ways to acquire more points than the other.

boardgame: Ghost Gate Chronicles: Part One – The Divide
description:
In The Divide, the first of syndicated roll & write series from Invisible Temple Games, you and up to 4 players help guide souls of the departed, the dreams of the living and primordial mana through The Ghost Gates: portals between the now and the hereafter. As you fulfill your ethereal duties something new and dramatic happens: The Ghost Gates are closing!

A communal pool of 2 white dice and 1 black die is rolled and players must simultaneously choose which column on their personal board to activate (1-2 for the left column, 3-4 for the middle and 5-6 for the right one). These activations are in fact movements where you cross off a symbol from a space to draw it in a space further.

As you play The Divide, your board will get increasingly hard to travel as you try to guide specific symbols to specific areas of the map that score you endgame points.

As you cross the middle threshold of the map, your symbols must bass through Ghost Gates. Doing so gives you 1 endgame point. If, at the end of a turn, a ghost gate is completely filled on a player's board, everyone at the table must cross that gate off also.

The game ends when the third gate is crossed off and the one with the most points wins!

boardgame: La venjança de la Tia Rosa: miniexpansió La Família Hort
description:
The vengeance of Aunt Rosa is a free mini-expansion of a single card for La Família Hort. It allows to add an automa player for enriching 2-player games, or to create a solo mode. You can download it for free at the website or get it for free when buying anything else at the webshop.

—description from the publisher (translated)

La venjança de la Tia Rosa és una miniexpansió gratuïta d’una sola carta per a La Família Hort. Permet afegir un jugador autòmata que enriquix les partides de 2 jugadors o crea un mode solitari per al joc. Pots descarregar ací el reglament i la carta per a imprimir-la a casa o bé obtindre la carta gratuïtament si fas qualsevol compra a la web de Zombi Paella.

—description from the publisher

Dragon at Sea is a simple and fast-paced strategy level naval wargame based on a what-if conflict in the Pacific in 202X. Game map is area based like the classic game War at Sea. Game map is A2 size. The game has 352 counters.

—description from the publisher

In 1000?, you want to get rid of all your cards in hand. On your turn, play a card higher than the one on the discard pile as long as it shares at least digit with that card. The 1000 card is an exception as it can be played over any other card and any card can be played over it.

Whenever you want, you can play a card face down and state that you've played a valid card for the turn. The next player can trust you and play, or they can reveal your card, with the player who bluffed or the player who mistakenly doubted the play drawing three cards as a penalty. (If you can't play and don't want to bluff, draw a card from the deck and add it to your hand to end your turn.)

Very similar (this goes from 01 to 99) to Trick 100 (this goes from 01 to 66)

Blood & Corpses is a 17-card Mini Expansion that adds new cards to the Psychopath Killer Card Game! Simply add the new Psychopath, Camper and Situation cards to their respective decks. Instructions for using the Situation Cards are found in the 5th Camper Expansion section of the Psychopath rulebook. NOW the Psychopath has more Corpses than ever to play with!

—description from the publisher

Create an entire scrapbook with your friends. You're a group of scrapbookers and one player is the guesser. Try your best to recreate a card hoping that the guesser can figure out which one it is. The closer the collage looks to the correct card, the easier it is for the guesser to guess it.

The guesser will show you a random card not knowing what it is. Use an image on your smart phone and pinch-to-zoom to try to make something in your photo resemble something on the card. Physically place your phone within the picture frame to show where it is located on the card. If the guesser guesses the correct card, add a new card into the deck and go again. However, two wrong guesses and the game is over!

NFL American Football Billionaire is a fast moving, high stakes American Football trading game.  Purchase and create the perfect NFL team by collecting the best players with matching synergy!  Hire and fire coaches, close deals with agents, be ready for the transfer window and swap players with your opposition.  Negotiate sponsorship deals, avoid penalties and increase the value of your NFL team!  Hold on to your best players, it's not easy being at the top!

Welcome to Gobble, the outrageously fun party card game that combines the excitement of TCG cores with the simplicity of quick, hilarious gameplay! Gather your friends, grab a drink, and get ready to unleash your cute monsters in a battle of gastronomic proportions.

In Gobble, participants engage in competitive gameplay aimed at consuming their opponents using an array of charming yet cunning monsters. As these creatures ingest adversaries, they progressively bolster their strength while employing unique traits such as inducing diarrhea, heartburn, and reflux. Our monsters redefine the concept of a 'digestive adventure,' presenting players with an innovative gaming experience.

With easy-to-learn rules and fast-paced action, Gobble is the perfect game for any social gathering, pub night, or game night with friends. Whether you're a seasoned gamer or new to the world of tabletop fun, Gobble offers endless entertainment and laughter for everyone involved.

Join the feast, outwit your opponents, and emerge victorious in the wild world of Gobble!

—description from the publisher

Rob iconic locations and prestigious casinos, and make sure you’re getting the biggest share of the loot! Millions of Dollars is a game of bluffing, misleading and negotiation that  leaves no room for randomness.

Players secretly choose roles and form temporary alliances. Any negotiation tactic is legitimate with your soon-to-be double-crossed accomplices! Those players who make it to the heist will share out the loot (or will they)!

In this second edition of the negotiation game Millions of Dollars, you will find all-new art, an increase in player count, and much streamlined rules that reduce the complexity and heighten the table-talk!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Best Candy on the Block: Rewrapped – Tricky Time Crisis Icecream Promos
description: Adds six icecream cards to Best Candy On The Block Rewrapped. Available as a stretch goal for the Tricky Time Crisis campaign, included with the Kickstarter edition of the game.

boardgame: The Glittering River: Russian Civil War Riverine Rules & Campaign System
description:
A full set of period specific rules that allow players to recreate the battles along the great rivers of the Russian Empire during the Russian Civil War.  Included are a full set of battle rules, a campaign system and all the playsheets required.

—description from the publisher

Mole Park is a carnival-themed party game for 2-8 players. Choose an implement from a Boxing Glove, Frying Pan, and Giant Mallet, and get Whacking! Once you have enough moles, cash them in for a prize, which will help you win better prizes in the future. Don't take too long though - first to win the grand prize (King Mole's Crown) is the champion!

Everyone makes their move in Mole Park simultaneously - there are no player turns. This leads to chaotic and exciting gameplay which really captures the feel of being at a carnival. There's enough luck that anyone could win their first game, but enough skill that they probably won't.

—description from the publisher
